NAMOChemical
EV 배터리 소재의
품질 혁신
나모케미칼의 QMS는 수입검사(IQC), 공정검사(PQC), 출하검사(OQC)를 통합 관리하여 고품질 배터리 소재의 안정적인 생산을 지원합니다.
IQC
수입 품질 검사
PQC
공정 품질 검사
OQC
출하 품질 검사

QMS 로그인

로그인 후 품질관리시스템을 사용합니다.

회사홈페이지 바로가기
메인
품질 검사
생산 관리

교육 관리
관리자

측정기 등록 / 수정

ℹ️ 최근 교정일과 교정주기 입력 시 다음 교정일이 자동 계산됩니다. 다음 교정일 기준 30일 이내는 교정예정, 지난 경우 교정초과로 표시됩니다.

측정기 목록

관리번호측정기명모델명제조사위치교정주기최근 교정일다음 교정일상태비고사진작업
공정능력 분석 (SPC)
분석 메뉴
엑셀 / CSV 업로드
📁
Raw데이터_입력 시트 또는 CSV 파일을 드래그하거나 선택

⚙ 분석 조건 · COA 기준

COA
단측 규격 항목은 Cp/Cpk 대신 Cpu 또는 Cpl 기준으로 판정합니다. 양측 규격 항목만 Cp/Cpk를 표시합니다.
총 시료수 (N)
-
부분군 수 (K)
-
전체 평균 (X̄)
-
군내 표준편차 (σ)
-
Cpu / Cpk
-

-

Raw 데이터 입력 · 관리 (부분군 x 측정값)

측정값 수정 즉시 Xbar/R, 관리도, Cp/Cpk, PPM이 재계산됩니다. 최소 100ea 기준입니다.

회원등록현황
관리자 전용 · 직책 등록으로 검토자/승인자 자격 부여 (부장·이사·임원 이상)

회원 등록 / 수정

ℹ️ 검토자·승인자 자격 직책: 부장, 이사, 상무, 전무, 임원, 대표이사, 대표, 사장, 회장, 본부장, 실장, 센터장, CEO, CTO, COO, CFO + 관리자(admin) 권한

비밀번호 변경

🏷 제품 부착용 라벨

측정기 사진

' ].join(''); w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close(); setTimeout(()=>{w.focus();w.print();},300); } /* namo-login-writer-auto-all-pages-final */ /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 로그인 당사자 작성자 자동 적용 최종 패치 적용 범위: 입고검사(IQC), 공정검사(PQC), 출하검사(OQC), 부적합/교육 등 - 신규 작성 화면 진입/로그인/초기화/페이지 이동 시 작성자 = 현재 로그인 사용자 - 초기화 버튼을 누르지 않아도 작성자 셀렉트에 본인 성명/직책 자동 표시 - 다른 계정 로그인 시 해당 계정의 성명/직책으로 자동 변경 - 기존 저장 문서 수정 모드(__qmsEditSignRecord)는 저장된 작성자를 우선 보존 ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ (function(){ 'use strict'; var TYPES = ['iqc','pqc','oqc','nc','training']; var ROLES = ['writer','reviewer','approver']; function $(id){ return document.getElementById(id); } function txt(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); } function esc(v){ return txt(v).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(s){return {'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[s];}); } function appState(){ return window.state || window.appState || {}; } function rawCurrentUser(){ var s = appState(); return s.currentUser || s.user || window.currentUser || window.loginUser || window.userInfo || null; } function normalizeUser(u){ if(!u) return null; var email = txt(u.email || u.mail || ''); var name = txt(u.name || u.username || u.userName || u.fullName || u.displayName || u.label || email || u.id || ''); var id = txt(u.id || u.userId || u.uid || email || name); if(!name && !id) return null; return { id:id || name, name:name || id, department:txt(u.department || u.dept || u.team || u.org || ''), title:txt(u.title || u.position || u.rank || u.jobTitle || u.roleName || ''), email:email, role:txt(u.role || u.userRole || '') }; } function me(){ return normalizeUser(rawCurrentUser()); } function keyOf(u){ return txt(u && (u.id || u.email || u.name)); } function label(u){ return (u.name || '-') + ' / ' + (u.title || u.department || '-'); } function isEditMode(type){ return !!(window.__qmsEditSignRecord && window.__qmsEditSignRecord[type]); } function isAdminUser(u){ var s = txt((u&&u.id)+' '+(u&&u.name)+' '+(u&&u.email)+' '+(u&&u.role)+' '+(u&&u.title)).toLowerCase(); return s.indexOf('admin') >= 0 || s.indexOf('관리자') >= 0; } function ensureTypeList(){ document.querySelectorAll('[id^="signGrid_"]').forEach(function(el){ var t = el.id.replace(/^signGrid_/,''); if(t && TYPES.indexOf(t) < 0) TYPES.push(t); }); } function ensureWriterOption(type, user){ var sel = $('sg_' + type + '_writer'); if(!sel || !user) return false; var key = keyOf(user); var found = null; Array.from(sel.options || []).forEach(function(o){ if(!found && (txt(o.value) === key || txt(o.dataset && o.dataset.email) === user.email || txt(o.dataset && o.dataset.name) === user.name)) found = o; }); if(!found){ found = document.createElement('option'); found.value = key; sel.insertBefore(found, sel.options && sel.options.length ? sel.options[0].nextSibling : null); } found.textContent = label(user); found.dataset.name = user.name || ''; found.dataset.title = user.title || ''; found.dataset.department = user.department || ''; found.dataset.email = user.email || ''; found.dataset.role = user.role || ''; sel.value = found.value; sel.disabled = true; sel.setAttribute('data-namo-login-writer-fixed','1'); return true; } function refreshWriterSub(type, user){ var sub = $('sg_' + type + '_writer_sub'); if(sub && user){ sub.textContent = txt((user.department || '') + ' ' + (user.title || '')) || user.email || '-'; } } function applyOne(type){ var user = me(); if(!user || isEditMode(type)) return; var grid = $('signGrid_' + type); if(!grid) return; if(!$('sg_' + type + '_writer') && typeof window.buildSignGrid === 'function'){ try{ window.buildSignGrid(type); }catch(e){} } if(ensureWriterOption(type, user)){ refreshWriterSub(type, user); try{ if(typeof window.restoreSignaturePad === 'function') window.restoreSignaturePad(type,'writer',window.signature데이터 ? window.signature데이터(type,'writer') : {}); }catch(e){} var sel = $('sg_' + type + '_writer'); if(sel){ sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); } } } function applyAll(){ ensureTypeList(); TYPES.forEach(applyOne); } function scheduleApply(){ [0,80,250,600,1200].forEach(function(ms){ setTimeout(applyAll, ms); }); } var oldRefresh = window.qmsRefreshSignatures; window.qmsRefreshSignatures = function(){ var r; if(typeof oldRefresh === 'function') r = oldRefresh.apply(this, arguments); scheduleApply(); return r; }; var oldBuild = window.buildSignGrid; if(typeof oldBuild === 'function'){ window.buildSignGrid = function(type){ var r = oldBuild.apply(this, arguments); setTimeout(function(){ applyOne(type); },0); return r; }; } var oldClear = window.clearSign; if(typeof oldClear === 'function'){ window.clearSign = function(type){ var r = oldClear.apply(this, arguments); setTimeout(function(){ applyOne(type); },0); return r; }; } var lastKey = ''; setInterval(function(){ var u = me(); var k = keyOf(u); if(k && k !== lastKey){ lastKey = k; scheduleApply(); } }, 700); document.addEventListener('click', function(e){ var t = e.target; if(t && t.closest && t.closest('.nav-item,[data-go],[data-page],#loginBtn,#signupBtn,.btn.light,.btn.pri')) scheduleApply(); }, true); document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', scheduleApply); window.addEventListener('load', scheduleApply); scheduleApply(); })(); /* ═══ AUTH ═══ */ function openLoginTab(t){ const toggle=(id,on)=>{const el=$(id);if(el)el.classList.toggle('active',on);}; toggle('tabLoginBtn',t==='login'); toggle('tabSignupBtn',t==='signup'); toggle('panelLogin',t==='login'); toggle('panelSignup',t==='signup'); } const REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY='namo_qms_saved_login_id'; function loadRememberedLoginId(){ const emailEl=$('loginEmail'); const chkEl=$('rememberLoginId'); if(!emailEl||!chkEl) return; const saved=(localStorage.getItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY)||'').trim(); if(saved){ emailEl.value=saved; chkEl.checked=true; } } function saveRememberedLoginId(email){ const chkEl=$('rememberLoginId'); if(!chkEl) return; if(chkEl.checked && email){ localStorage.setItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY,email); }else{ localStorage.removeItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY); } } async function login(){ $('loginError').textContent=''; const email=$('loginEmail').value.trim(),pwd=$('loginPassword').value.trim(); if(!email||!pwd){$('loginError').textContent='이메일과 비밀번호를 입력하세요.';return;} saveRememberedLoginId(email); const{data}=await api('/api/auth/login',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({email,password:pwd})}); if(!data?.success){$('loginError').textContent=data?.message||'로그인에 실패했습니다.';return;} const token=data?.token || data?.accessToken || data?.access_token || data?.data?.token || data?.data?.accessToken || data?.data?.access_token; if(token) setAuthToken(token); else sessionStorage.setItem('qms_logged_in','1'); await checkLogin(true);await loadAll데이터(); } async function signup(){ $('signupError').textContent=''; const p={name:$('signupName').value.trim(),email:$('signupEmail').value.trim(),department:$('signupDepartment').value.trim(),title:$('signupTitle').value.trim(),password:$('signupPassword').value.trim()}; if(!p.name||!p.email||!p.password){$('signupError').textContent='성명, 이메일, 비밀번호는 필수입니다.';return;} const{data}=await api('/api/auth/signup',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); if(!data?.success){$('signupError').textContent=data?.message||'회원가입에 실패했습니다.';return;} alert(data.message||'회원가입이 완료되었습니다.');openLoginTab('login'); } async function checkLogin(force=false){ // 최초 진입 시 토큰/로그인 힌트가 없으면 /api/auth/me를 호출하지 않아 401 콘솔 오류를 방지합니다. // 로그인 직후에는 force=true로 호출하여 쿠키 세션 방식도 계속 지원합니다. if(!force && !hasLoginHint()){ showLoggedOut(); return false; } const{res,data}=await api('/api/auth/me'); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){showLoggedOut();return false;} sessionStorage.setItem('qms_logged_in','1'); const user=data.data||data.user||data; state.currentUser=user; const lp=$('loginPage'); if(lp) lp.style.display='none'; document.body.classList.remove('login-active'); const sh=document.querySelector('.shell'); if(sh) sh.style.display='flex'; updateProfileUI(user); setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applyAllSignPermissions==='function')applyAllSignPermissions();},100); setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof rebuildAllSignGrids==='function')rebuildAllSignGrids();else if(typeof applyAllSignPermissions==='function')applyAllSignPermissions();},500); return true; } function updateProfileUI(u){ const n=u?.name||'사용자'; if($('profileName'))$('profileName').textContent=n; if($('profileEmail'))$('profileEmail').textContent=u?.email||''; if($('profileAvatar'))$('profileAvatar').textContent=n.charAt(0)||'사'; const isAdmin=!!( u?.isAdmin === true || u?.admin === true || u?.is_admin === true || String(u?.role||'').toLowerCase()==='admin' || String(u?.role||'').includes('관리자') || String(u?.permission||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.auth||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.authority||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.grade||'').includes('관리자') || String(u?.name||'').includes('관리자') || String(u?.email||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') ); $('openUserManage').style.display=isAdmin?'block':'none'; $('usersNavBtn').style.display=isAdmin?'flex':'none'; $('adminNavTitle').style.display=isAdmin?'block':'none'; } async function logout(){await api('/api/auth/logout',{method:'POST'});clearAuthToken();closeProfileMenu();await checkLogin();} function openPwdModal(){$('passwordModal').classList.add('show');['currentPassword','newPassword','confirmPassword'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');} function closePwdModal(){$('passwordModal').classList.remove('show');} async function changePwd(){ const cp=$('currentPassword').value.trim(),np=$('newPassword').value.trim(),cf=$('confirmPassword').value.trim(); if(!cp||!np||!cf){alert('모든 항목을 입력하세요.');return;} if(np!==cf){alert('새 비밀번호 확인이 일치하지 않습니다.');return;} const{data}=await api('/api/auth/change-password',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({currentPassword:cp,newPassword:np})}); alert(data?.message||'처리되었습니다.');if(data?.success)closePwdModal(); } function closeProfileMenu(){$('profileDropdown').classList.remove('show');} function goHome(){ $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); const dashBtn=document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-page="dashboard"]'); if(dashBtn)dashBtn.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active')); const dashPage=$('page-dashboard'); if(dashPage)dashPage.classList.add('active'); const content=document.querySelector('.content'); if(content)content.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); closeProfileMenu(); } /* ═══ NAV ═══ */ function bindNav(){ $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',async()=>{ const pg=btn.dataset.page; $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));btn.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));$(`page-${pg}`).classList.add('active'); setTimeout(()=>refreshSignaturePads($(`page-${pg}`)),80); if(pg==='users')await loadAdminUsers(); if(pg==='report'){populateReportSelect();loadStandaloneReport();} }); }); $$('.sc[data-go]').forEach(card=>{ const move=()=>{ const pg=card.dataset.go; const nav=document.querySelector(`.nav-item[data-page="${pg}"]`); if(nav) nav.click(); }; card.addEventListener('click',move); card.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); move(); } }); }); } /* ═══ INIT ═══ */ function initYears(){const c=new Date().getFullYear();$('dashYear').innerHTML='';for(let y=c-2;y<=c+2;y++){const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=y;o.textContent=`${y}년`;if(y===c)o.selected=true;$('dashYear').appendChild(o);}} function setDefaultDates(){['incomingDate','processDate','shipmentDate','worklogDate','ncDate','spcDate'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value=todayKST();});} /* ═══ DEFAULT ITEMS ═══ */ function defIqc(){return[{item:'외관',spec:'이물질, 파손 없을 것',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'CoA',spec:'누락 없을 것',value:'',judge:'합격'}];} function defPqc(){return[{item:'외관',spec:'이상 없을 것',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'점도',spec:'1,500±300cp',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'고형분',spec:'20.0±1.0wt.%',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'Dmax',spec:'≤ 10.0 μm',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'접착력',spec:'≥ 400 gf/12.7 mm',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'절연저항',spec:'≥ 200 MΩ',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'전해액 팽윤성',spec:'< 120%',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'수분',spec:'< 2,000ppm',value:'',judge:'합격'}];} function defOqc(){return[{item:'외관',spec:'이상 없을 것',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'포장',spec:'파손 없을 것',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'점도',spec:'1,500±300cp',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'고형분',spec:'20.0±1.0wt.%',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'Dmax',spec:'≤ 10.0 μm',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'접착력',spec:'≥ 400 gf/12.7 mm',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'절연저항',spec:'≥ 200 MΩ',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'전해액 팽윤성',spec:'< 120%',value:'',judge:'합격'},{item:'수분',spec:'< 2,000ppm',value:'',judge:'합격'}];} /* ═══ ITEM EDITOR ═══ */ function renderItems(tbId,rows,type){$(tbId).innerHTML=rows.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}`).join('');} function getDraft(t){return t==='incoming'?state.incomingItemDrafts:t==='process'?state.processItemDrafts:state.shipmentItemDrafts;} function reRender(t){t==='incoming'?renderIqcItems():t==='process'?renderPqcItems():renderOqcItems();} function syncP(t){t==='incoming'?syncIqcPreview():t==='process'?syncPqcPreview():syncOqcPreview();} function bindItemDelegate(tbId){const tb=$(tbId);if(!tb)return;tb.addEventListener('input',e=>{const el=e.target,t=el.dataset.type,i=Number(el.dataset.idx),k=el.dataset.key;if(!t||isNaN(i)||!k)return;getDraft(t)[i][k]=el.value;syncP(t);}); tb.addEventListener('change',e=>{const el=e.target,t=el.dataset.type,i=Number(el.dataset.idx),k=el.dataset.key;if(!t||isNaN(i)||!k)return;getDraft(t)[i][k]=el.value;syncP(t);}); tb.addEventListener('click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('[data-action="removeItem"]');if(!btn)return;getDraft(btn.dataset.type).splice(Number(btn.dataset.idx),1);reRender(btn.dataset.type);}); } function renderIqcItems(){renderItems('incomingItemsTable',state.incomingItemDrafts,'incoming');syncIqcPreview();} function renderPqcItems(){renderItems('processItemsTable',state.processItemDrafts,'process');syncPqcPreview();} function renderOqcItems(){renderItems('shipmentItemsTable',state.shipmentItemDrafts,'shipment');syncOqcPreview();} /* ═══ PREVIEW ═══ */ function renderPrevRows(tbId,items){$(tbId).innerHTML=items.length?items.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}${esc(r.item||'')}${esc(r.spec||'')}${esc(r.value||'-')}${jBadge(r.judge||'합격')}`).join(''):'항목 없음';} function syncIqcPreview(){ const items=state.incomingItemDrafts;const date=$('incomingDate').value||todayKST();const doc=generateNmDocNo(); $('incomingMetaTable').innerHTML=`문서번호${doc}일자${date}LOT${esc($('incomingLot').value||'-')}협력업체${esc($('incomingSupplier').value||'-')}품목${esc($('incomingItem').value||'-')}입고수량${esc($('incomingQty').value||'0')}검사수량${esc($('incomingCheckQty').value||'0')}불량수량${esc($('incomingFailQty').value||'0')}`; renderPrevRows('incomingPreviewBody',items);$('incomingFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcIqcLot',$('incomingLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcIqcDoc',doc); } function syncPqcPreview(){ const items=state.processItemDrafts;const date=$('processDate').value||todayKST();const doc=`PQC-${date.replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; $('processMetaTable').innerHTML=`문서번호${doc}일자${date}LOT${esc($('processLot').value||'-')}설비명${esc($('processLine').value||'-')}제품명${esc($('processProduct').value||'-')}작업조${esc($('processShift').value||'-')}검사수량${esc($('processQty').value||'0')}불량수량${esc($('processFailQty').value||'0')}`; renderPrevRows('processPreviewBody',items);$('processFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcPqcLot',$('processLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcPqcDoc',doc); } function syncOqcPreview(){ const items=state.shipmentItemDrafts;const date=$('shipmentDate').value||todayKST();const doc=`OQC-${date.replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; $('shipmentMetaTable').innerHTML=`문서번호${doc}일자${date}완제품 LOT${esc($('shipmentLot').value||'-')}고객사${esc($('shipmentCustomer').value||'-')}제품명${esc($('shipmentProduct').value||'-')}검사수량${esc($('shipmentQty').value||'0')}불량수량${esc($('shipmentFailQty').value||'0')}비고${esc($('shipmentRemark').value||'-')}`; renderPrevRows('shipmentPreviewBody',items);$('shipmentFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcOqcLot',$('shipmentLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcOqcDoc',doc); } /* ═══ 성적서 페이지 ═══ */ function populateReportSelect(){ const type=$('reportType').value;const sel=$('reportSelect');sel.innerHTML=''; let arr=type==='iqc'?state.incoming:type==='pqc'?state.process:state.shipment; arr=[...arr].sort((a,b)=>(b.date||'')>(a.date||'')?1:-1); arr.forEach(r=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=r.id;o.textContent=type==='iqc'?`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.supplier}`:type==='pqc'?`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.product}`:`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.customer}`;sel.appendChild(o);}); if(arr.length)sel.value=arr[0].id; } function setReportSignature(role,data){ const cap=signRoleCap(role); const nameEl=document.getElementById(`rRpt${cap}`); if(!nameEl)return; const col=nameEl.closest('.rpsign-col'); if(!col)return; let img=col.querySelector('.rpsign-img'); if(!img){ img=document.createElement('img'); img.className='rpsign-img'; img.alt='전자서명'; img.style.display='none'; col.insertBefore(img,nameEl); } let dateEl=col.querySelector('.rpsign-date'); if(!dateEl){ dateEl=document.createElement('div'); dateEl.className='rpsign-date'; dateEl.style.fontSize='10px'; dateEl.style.color='#666'; dateEl.style.marginTop='2px'; const titleEl=document.getElementById(`rRpt${cap}T`); if(titleEl)titleEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',dateEl); else nameEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',dateEl); } if(data?.signImage){ img.src=data.signImage; img.style.display='block'; }else{ img.removeAttribute('src'); img.style.display='none'; } dateEl.textContent=data?.signDate||''; } function loadStandaloneReport(){ const type=$('reportType').value,selId=$('reportSelect').value; const arr=type==='iqc'?state.incoming:type==='pqc'?state.process:state.shipment; const row=selId?arr.find(r=>String(r.id)===String(selId)):arr[0]; if(!row){$('reportMetaTable').innerHTML='데이터가 없습니다.';$('reportBodyTable').innerHTML='';$('reportFinalText').textContent='-';return;} $('reportPageTitle').textContent=type==='iqc'?'입고검사 성적서 (IQC Report)':type==='pqc'?'공정검사 성적서 (PQC Report)':'출하검사 성적서 (OQC Report)'; const docNo=`${type.toUpperCase()}-${String(row.date||'').replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; const meta=type==='iqc'? `문서번호${docNo}일자${row.date||'-'}LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}협력업체${esc(row.supplier||'-')}품목${esc(row.item||'-')}입고수량${row.incomingQty??'-'}`: type==='pqc'? `문서번호${docNo}일자${row.date||'-'}LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}설비명${esc(row.line||'-')}제품명${esc(row.product||'-')}검사수량${row.qty??'-'}`: `문서번호${docNo}일자${row.date||'-'}완제품 LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}고객사${esc(row.customer||'-')}제품명${esc(row.product||'-')}검사수량${row.qty??'-'}`; $('reportMetaTable').innerHTML=meta; const items=Array.isArray(row.items)?row.items:[]; $('reportBodyTable').innerHTML=items.length?items.map((x,i)=>`${i+1}${esc(x.item||'')}${esc(x.spec||'')}${esc(x.value||'-')}${jBadge(x.judge||'합격')}`).join(''):'항목 없음'; $('reportFinalText').textContent=calcJ(items); const sw=row.signWriter,sr=row.signReviewer,sa=row.signApprover; $('rRptWriter').textContent=sw?.name||'-';$('rRptWriterT').textContent=sw?.title||''; $('rRptReviewer').textContent=sr?.name||'-';$('rRptReviewerT').textContent=sr?.title||''; $('rRptApprover').textContent=sa?.name||'-';$('rRptApproverT').textContent=sa?.title||''; setReportSignature('writer',sw); setReportSignature('reviewer',sr); setReportSignature('approver',sa); setTimeout(()=>{renderBC('bcRptLot',row.lot||'LOT');renderBC('bcRptDoc',docNo);},50); } /* ═══ PRINT ═══ */ let cachedPrintIp = ''; function getPrintUser(){ const cur = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.currentUser) ? state.currentUser : null; const nameFromDom = (document.getElementById('profileName')?.textContent || '').trim(); const emailFromDom = (document.getElementById('profileEmail')?.textContent || '').trim(); return { name: cur?.name || nameFromDom || '-', email: cur?.email || emailFromDom || '', department: cur?.department || cur?.dept || '', title: cur?.title || cur?.position || '' }; } function getPrintDateTime(){ const now = new Date(); const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0'); return now.getFullYear() + '-' + pad(now.getMonth() + 1) + '-' + pad(now.getDate()) + ' ' + pad(now.getHours()) + ':' + pad(now.getMinutes()) + ':' + pad(now.getSeconds()); } async function getPrintIp(){ if(cachedPrintIp) return cachedPrintIp; try{ const res = await fetch('https://api.ipify.org?format=json',{cache:'no-store'}); const data = await res.json(); cachedPrintIp = data?.ip || '-'; }catch(e){ cachedPrintIp = '-'; } return cachedPrintIp; } async function appendPrintUserInfo(target){ if(!target) return; target.querySelectorAll('.print-user-info').forEach(x=>x.remove()); const user = getPrintUser(); const ip = await getPrintIp(); const info = document.createElement('div'); info.className = 'print-user-info'; info.textContent = '출력자 : ' + (user.name || '-') + (user.title ? ' ' + user.title : '') + (user.department ? ' / ' + user.department : '') + (user.email ? ' (' + user.email + ')' : '') + ' ｜ 출력시간 : ' + getPrintDateTime() ; target.appendChild(info); } async function printEl(el){ if(!el) return; document.querySelectorAll('#printTarget').forEach(x=>{ x.remove(); }); const clone = el.cloneNode(true); clone.id = 'printTarget'; if(el.id==='trainingPreviewSheet') clone.classList.add('training-print-onepage'); // canvas 서명은 cloneNode 때 그림이 복사되지 않으므로 이미지로 변환해서 인쇄 const originalCanvases=el.querySelectorAll('canvas'); const clonedCanvases=clone.querySelectorAll('canvas'); originalCanvases.forEach((cv,i)=>{ const ccv=clonedCanvases[i]; if(!ccv)return; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.className=cv.className||'sign-pad'; img.style.width=cv.style.width||'100%'; img.style.height=cv.style.height||'76px'; img.style.objectFit='contain'; const key=(cv.dataset.signType&&cv.dataset.signRole)?`${cv.dataset.signType}:${cv.dataset.signRole}`:''; const stored=key&&window.__signImageStore&&window.__signImageStore[key]?window.__signImageStore[key].signImage:''; try{ img.src=stored||cv.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(e){ img.src=stored||''; } if(img.src)ccv.replaceWith(img); }); await appendPrintUserInfo(clone); document.body.appendChild(clone); setTimeout(()=>{ window.print(); },300); window.onafterprint = ()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#printTarget').forEach(x=>{ x.remove(); }); window.onafterprint = null; }; } /* ═══ LOAD DATA ═══ */ function normalizeSignUser(u){ if(!u)return null; const id=String(u.id ?? u.user_id ?? u.email ?? "").trim(); const name=String(u.name ?? u.username ?? "").trim(); if(!id || !name)return null; return{ id, name, email:u.email||"", department:u.department||u.dept||"", title:u.title||u.position||"", role:u.role||"user", status:u.status||"APPROVED" }; } function uniqSignUsers(list){ const m=new Map(); (list||[]).map(normalizeSignUser).filter(Boolean).forEach(u=>{ if(String(u.status||"").toUpperCase()!=="REJECTED")m.set(u.id,u); }); return Array.from(m.values()); } async function fetchUserListForSelectors(){ const endpoints = [ '/api/users/signable', '/api/users', '/api/members', '/api/auth/users', '/api/admin/users' ]; for(const url of endpoints){ try{ const {res,data} = await api(url); if(!res || !res.ok) continue; const list = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data?.data || data?.users || data?.members || data?.list || []); if(Array.isArray(list) && list.length) return list; }catch(e){ console.warn('[users] 회원 후보 API 실패:', url, e); } } return []; } async function loadSignableUsers(){ let users = []; // 현재 로그인 사용자는 항상 작성자 후보에 포함 if(state.currentUser) users.push(state.currentUser); // 관리자/일반회원 모두 동일하게 수신부서·참조부서 후보를 보도록 공개 회원 API를 우선 사용한다. // 서버에 공개 API가 있으면 /api/users/signable 또는 /api/users가 사용되고, // 관리자 계정에서는 기존 /api/admin/users도 마지막 fallback으로 동작한다. try{ const allUsers = await fetchUserListForSelectors(); if(allUsers.length) users = users.concat(allUsers); }catch(e){ console.warn('[sign] 전체 회원 목록 로드 실패:', e); } state.signableUsers = uniqSignUsers(users); state.adminUsers = state.signableUsers; window.signableUsers = state.signableUsers; window.adminUsers = state.adminUsers; if(window.NAMO_SIGN_DEBUG) console.log(`[sign] 서명 후보 로드: ${state.signableUsers.length}명`); rebuildAllSignGrids(); } async function loadAdminUsers(){ try{ const list = await fetchUserListForSelectors(); state.adminUsers = list || []; state.signableUsers = uniqSignUsers([ ...(state.currentUser ? [state.currentUser] : []), ...state.adminUsers ]); window.signableUsers = state.signableUsers; window.adminUsers = state.adminUsers; renderUserTable(); rebuildAllSignGrids(); }catch(e){ console.warn('[admin] 회원 목록 로드 실패:', e); } } /* ★★★ 날짜 KST 변환 적용된 loadIncoming ★★★ */ async function loadIncoming(){ const{data}=await api('/api/iqc'); state.incoming=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // ★ KST 변환/대체 날짜 자동 인식 lot:r.lot, supplier:r.supplier, item:r.item, inspector:r.inspector, incomingQty:r.incoming_qty, checkQty:r.qty, failQty:r.fail, items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:[], signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderIncomingTable(); } /* ★★★ 날짜 KST 변환 적용된 loadProcess ★★★ */ async function loadProcess(){ const{data}=await api('/api/pqc'); state.process=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // ★ KST 변환/대체 날짜 자동 인식 lot:r.lot, product:r.product, line:r.visual, shift:r.particle, inspector:r.solid, qty:r.qty, failQty:r.fail, judge:r.judge, items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:[], signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderProcessTable(); } /* ★★★ 날짜 KST 변환 적용된 loadShipment ★★★ */ async function loadShipment(){ const{data}=await api('/api/oqc'); state.shipment=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // ★ KST 변환/대체 날짜 자동 인식 customer:r.customer, product:r.product, lot:r.lot, inspector:r.visual, qty:r.qty, failQty:r.fail, judge:r.judge, package:r.package, items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:[], signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderShipmentTable(); } /* ★★★ 날짜 KST 변환 적용된 loadNonconform ★★★ */ async function loadNonconform(){ const{data}=await api('/api/nonconform'); state.nonconform=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, ncDate:toKSTDate(r.nc_date), // ★ KST 변환 ncNo:r.nc_no, ncType:r.nc_type, dept:r.dept, lot:r.lot, item:r.item, qty:r.qty, issue:r.issue, cause:r.cause, action:r.action, actionDate:toKSTDate(r.action_date), // ★ KST 변환 verify:r.verify, verifyDate:toKSTDate(r.verify_date), // ★ KST 변환 owner:r.owner, status:r.status, signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderNcTable(); } async function loadSuppliers(){const{data}=await api('/api/suppliers');state.suppliers=data?.data||[];renderSupplierTable();} /* ★★★ 날짜 KST 변환 적용된 loadWorklog ★★★ */ async function loadWorklog(){ const{data}=await api('/api/worklog'); // worklog는 서버에서 그대로 쓰되 렌더 시 toKSTDate 적용 state.worklog=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ ...r, workDate: toKSTDate(r.workDate || r.work_date || r.date) // ★ KST 변환 })); renderWorklogTable(); } function defaultInstruments(){ return [ {id:'default-01',no:'NM측정-01',name:'Drying Oven',model:'ThermoStableTM',maker:'DAIHANScientific',location:'연구소',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'정상',remark:''}, {id:'default-02',no:'NM측정-02',name:'Vacuum Oven',model:'ThermoStableTM OF-155',maker:'DAIHANScientific',location:'연구소',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'정상',remark:''}, {id:'default-03',no:'NM측정-03',name:'인장시험기',model:'UNITEST-M1',maker:'TEST ONE',location:'연구소',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'정상',remark:''}, {id:'default-04',no:'NM측정-04',name:'입도분석기',model:'Mastersizer 3000',maker:'Malvern Panalytical',location:'연구소',cycle:'12',lastCal:'',nextCal:'',status:'정상',remark:''} ]; } async function migrateLegacyInstrumentsToServerIfNeeded(serverList){ const marker='namo_qms_instruments_migrated_to_server_v1'; if(Array.isArray(serverList)&&serverList.length>0)return false; if(localStorage.getItem(marker)==='1')return false; let legacy=[]; try{legacy=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('namo_qms_instruments')||'[]')||[];}catch(e){legacy=[];} if(!Array.isArray(legacy)||!legacy.length)return false; let migrated=0; for(const x of legacy){ if(!x||!txt(x.no)||!txt(x.name))continue; const p={ no:txt(x.no),name:txt(x.name),model:txt(x.model),maker:txt(x.maker),location:txt(x.location), cycle:txt(x.cycle)||'12',lastCal:txt(x.lastCal||x.last_cal)||null,nextCal:txt(x.nextCal||x.next_cal)||null, status:txt(x.status)||'정상',remark:txt(x.remark),photo:txt(x.photo) }; const {res}=await api('/api/instruments',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); if(res.ok)migrated++; } if(migrated>0){localStorage.setItem(marker,'1');return true;} return false; } async function loadInstruments(){ const {res,data}=await api('/api/instruments'); if(res.ok&&data?.success){ let rows=data.data||[]; const migrated=await migrateLegacyInstrumentsToServerIfNeeded(rows); if(migrated){ const again=await api('/api/instruments'); rows=again.data?.data||rows; } state.instruments=(rows||[]).map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); if(!state.instruments.length){ // DB와 기존 브라우저 저장소가 모두 비어 있을 때만 기본 측정기를 화면에 표시합니다. state.instruments=defaultInstruments().map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); } }else{ const raw=localStorage.getItem('namo_qms_instruments'); let list=[]; try{list=raw?JSON.parse(raw):[];}catch(e){list=[];} if(!Array.isArray(list)||list.length===0){ list=defaultInstruments(); try{localStorage.setItem('namo_qms_instruments',JSON.stringify(list));}catch(e){} } state.instruments=list.map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); } renderInstrumentTable(); } function saveInstrumentsLocal(){ try{localStorage.setItem('namo_qms_instruments',JSON.stringify(state.instruments));}catch(e){} } async function loadAll데이터(){ await loadSignableUsers(); await Promise.all([loadIncoming(),loadProcess(),loadShipment(),loadSuppliers(),loadWorklog(),loadNonconform(),loadInstruments(),loadTrainingReports()]); loadSpcReports(); if(state.currentUser?.role==='admin')await loadAdminUsers(); renderSummary();setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof renderSummary==='function')renderSummary();},250);populateReportSelect();loadStandaloneReport(); if(typeof renderTrainingTable==='function')renderTrainingTable(); if(typeof renderTrainingPreview==='function')renderTrainingPreview(); } /* ═══ RENDER TABLES ═══ */ function renderIncomingTable(){ const tb=$('incomingTable');if(!state.incoming.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(12);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.incoming.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.lot||'')}${esc(r.supplier||'')}${esc(r.item||'')}${r.incomingQty??''}${r.checkQty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderProcessTable(){ const tb=$('processTable');if(!state.process.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(11);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.process.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.lot||'')}${esc(r.product||'')}${esc(r.line||'')}${r.qty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderShipmentTable(){ const tb=$('shipmentTable');if(!state.shipment.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(11);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.shipment.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.customer||'')}${esc(r.product||'')}${esc(r.lot||'')}${r.qty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function ncStatusBadge(s){const cls=s==='완결'?'closed':s==='처리중'?'progress':'open';return`${esc(s||'미결')}`;} function renderNcTable(){ const tb=$('nonconformTable');if(!state.nonconform.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(13);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.nonconform.map(r=>`${r.ncDate||''}${esc(r.ncNo||'-')}${esc(r.ncType||'-')}${esc(r.dept||'-')}${esc(r.lot||'-')}${esc(r.item||'-')}${r.qty??0}${esc(r.owner||'-')}${ncStatusBadge(r.status)}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderSupplierTable(){ const tb=$('supplierTable');if(!state.suppliers.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(6);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.suppliers.map(r=>`${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.manager||'')}${esc(r.phone||'')}${esc(r.category||'')}${esc(r.status||'')}
`).join(''); } function instrumentBadge(s){ const cls=s==='정상'?'pass':s==='교정예정'?'hold':s==='교정초과'?'fail':'info'; return `${esc(s||'정상')}`; } function instrumentPhotoSrc(r){ return r?.photo || r?.photoUrl || r?.image || r?.imageUrl || ''; } function renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(){ const src=$('instrumentPhoto')?.value?.trim()||''; const wrap=$('instrumentPhotoPreview'),img=$('instrumentPhotoPreviewImg'); if(!wrap||!img)return; if(src){img.src=src;wrap.style.display='inline-block';} else{img.removeAttribute('src');wrap.style.display='none';} } function handleInstrumentPhotoFile(e){ const file=e?.target?.files?.[0]; if(!file)return; if(!file.type.startsWith('image/')){alert('이미지 파일만 선택할 수 있습니다.');e.target.value='';return;} const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=()=>{if($('instrumentPhoto'))$('instrumentPhoto').value=reader.result;renderInstrumentPhotoPreview();}; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function viewInstrumentPhoto(id){ const r=state.instruments.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id)); if(!r)return; const src=instrumentPhotoSrc(r); if(!src){alert('등록된 측정기 사진이 없습니다.');return;} if($('instrumentPhotoModalTitle'))$('instrumentPhotoModalTitle').textContent=`${r.name||'측정기'} 사진`; if($('instrumentPhotoModalImg'))$('instrumentPhotoModalImg').src=src; if($('instrumentPhotoModalMeta'))$('instrumentPhotoModalMeta').innerHTML=`${esc(r.name||'-')} (${esc(r.no||'-')})
모델명: ${esc(r.model||'-')}
제조사: ${esc(r.maker||'-')}
설치장소: ${esc(r.location||'-')}`; if($('instrumentPhotoModal'))$('instrumentPhotoModal').classList.add('show'); } function closeInstrumentPhotoModal(){ if($('instrumentPhotoModal'))$('instrumentPhotoModal').classList.remove('show'); if($('instrumentPhotoModalImg'))$('instrumentPhotoModalImg').removeAttribute('src'); } function renderInstrumentTable(){ const tb=$('instrumentTable');if(!tb)return; if(!state.instruments.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(12);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.instruments.map(r=>{ const photo=instrumentPhotoSrc(r); const photoCell=photo?``:`-`; return `${esc(r.no||'')}${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.model||'')}${esc(r.maker||'')}${esc(r.location||'')}${esc(r.cycle||'')}개월${esc(r.lastCal||'-')}${esc(r.nextCal||'-')}${instrumentBadge(instrumentAutoStatus(r.nextCal,r.status))}${esc(r.remark||'')}${photoCell}
`; }).join(''); } function renderWorklogTable(){ const tb=$('worklogTable');if(!tb)return;if(!state.worklog.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(8);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.worklog.map(r=>{ const lot=(r.finishedLot||'').toLowerCase(); const iq=state.incoming.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const pq=state.process.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const oq=state.shipment.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const lk=[iq?`IQC ${iq}`:'',pq?`PQC ${pq}`:'',oq?`OQC ${oq}`:''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')||`없음`; return`${r.workDate||''}${esc(r.finishedLot||'')}${esc(r.worker||'')}${esc(r.planQty||'')}${esc(r.prodQty||'')}${esc(r.failQty||'')}${lk}
`; }).join(''); } function renderUserTable(){ const tb=$('userTable');if(!state.adminUsers.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(8);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.adminUsers.map(r=>`${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.email||'')}${esc(r.department||'')}${esc(r.title||'-')}${isSenior(r)?'검토/승인 가능':''}${r.role==='admin'?'관리자':'일반회원'}${r.status||''}${toKSTDate(String(r.created_at||'').slice(0,10)||r.created_at)}
`).join(''); } /* 통합 관제 도넛 KPI: 현재 데이터/조회연도 기준 연동 */ function num(v){const n=Number(v);return isFinite(n)?n:0;} function sumFail(arr){return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).reduce((a,r)=>a+num(r.failQty??r.fail_qty??r.fail??r.ngQty??0),0);} function byLotSet(arr){return new Set((Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).map(r=>String(r.lot||r.finishedLot||r.ncLot||'').trim()).filter(Boolean));} function cntStatus(arr,match){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>match(String(r.status||r.state||r.result||'').trim(),r)).length; } function setBreak(key,name,val){document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-break="${key}:${name}"]`).forEach(el=>el.textContent=`${Number(val)||0}건`);} function setDonutSegments(key,total,parts){ const donut=document.querySelector(`[data-qmes-donut="${key}"]`); if(!donut)return; const vals=parts.map(v=>Math.max(0,Number(v)||0)); let denom=vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); if(denom<=0) denom=Math.max(1,Number(total)||0); let acc=0; const ps=vals.map(v=>{acc+=denom?Math.round(v/denom*100):0;return Math.min(100,acc);}); if(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)<=0 && Number(total)>0){ps[0]=100;ps[1]=100;ps[2]=100;ps[3]=100;} donut.style.setProperty('--p1',(ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p2',(ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p3',(ps[2]||ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p4',(ps[3]||ps[2]||ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); } function isTrainingDone(r){ const raw=[r?.status,r?.approvalStatus,r?.approval_status,r?.state,r?.result,r?.signStatus,r?.sign_status].map(v=>String(v||'')).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const signApprover = r?.signApprover || r?.sign_approver || {}; const approvedBy = r?.approvedBy || r?.approved_by || ''; const approvedAt = r?.approvedAt || r?.approved_at || ''; const approverStatus = String(signApprover.status || signApprover.approvalStatus || '').toLowerCase(); const approverDate = signApprover.signDate || signApprover.signedAt || signApprover.approvedAt || signApprover.date || ''; // 결재대기/검토중 문구에는 '결재'가 포함되므로 완료로 오판하지 않도록 먼저 제외합니다. if(/반려|reject|취소|cancel/.test(raw)) return false; if(/결재대기|검토대기|승인대기|대기|pending|requested|request|reviewed|review|검토중|검토완료/.test(raw)) return false; // 승인자 이름이 지정된 것만으로 완료 처리하지 않고, 실제 승인 상태/승인일/완료 결과가 있을 때만 완료입니다. if(/승인완료|최종승인|approved|complete|completed|done|closed/.test(raw)) return true; if(raw.split(/\s+/).indexOf('완료') >= 0) return true; if(approvedBy || approvedAt) return true; if(/approved|approve|완료|승인완료/.test(approverStatus) && approverDate) return true; return false; } function isTrainingProgress(r){ const raw=[r?.status,r?.approvalStatus,r?.approval_status,r?.state,r?.result].map(v=>String(v||'')).join(' ').toLowerCase(); if(isTrainingDone(r)) return false; return /진행|검토|상신|결재|review|progress|pending/.test(raw); } function updateTrendKpis(inRows,prRows,shRows){ // 월별 검사 현황 추이는 수입검사(IQC), 공정검사(PQC), 출하검사(OQC)만 집계합니다. const total=(inRows?.length||0)+(prRows?.length||0)+(shRows?.length||0); const fail=[...(inRows||[]),...(prRows||[]),...(shRows||[])].reduce((a,r)=>a+num(r.failQty??r.fail_qty??r.fail??r.ngQty??0),0); const passRate=total?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,((total-fail)/total*100))).toFixed(1):'0.0'; const totalEl=document.getElementById('trendTotalCount'); const passEl=document.getElementById('trendPassRate'); if(totalEl) totalEl.textContent=`${total}건`; if(passEl) passEl.textContent=`${passRate}%`; } function updateQmesDonuts(vals){ const s=(typeof state==='object'&&state)?state:{}; const y=Number((document.getElementById('dashYear')&&document.getElementById('dashYear').value)||new Date().getFullYear()); const inRows=(Array.isArray(s.incoming)?s.incoming:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const prRows=(Array.isArray(s.process)?s.process:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const shRows=(Array.isArray(s.shipment)?s.shipment:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const ncRows=(Array.isArray(s.nonconform)?s.nonconform:[]); const trRows=(Array.isArray(s.trainingReports)?s.trainingReports:(Array.isArray(s.training)?s.training:[])).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const numbers={ incoming:Number(vals?.incoming ?? inRows.length ?? 0), process:Number(vals?.process ?? prRows.length ?? 0), shipment:Number(vals?.shipment ?? shRows.length ?? 0), nonconform:Number(vals?.nonconform ?? ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.status||'미결')!=='완결').length ?? 0), training:Number(vals?.training ?? trRows.length ?? 0) }; const labels={ incoming:`전체 ${numbers.incoming}건`, process:`전체 ${numbers.process}건`, shipment:`전체 ${numbers.shipment}건`, nonconform:`미결 ${numbers.nonconform}건`, training:`전체 ${numbers.training}건` }; const lotIncoming=byLotSet(inRows), lotProcess=byLotSet(prRows), lotShipment=byLotSet(shRows); const ncIncoming=ncRows.filter(r=>lotIncoming.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncProcess=ncRows.filter(r=>lotProcess.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncShipment=ncRows.filter(r=>lotShipment.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncOpen=ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.status||'미결')!=='완결').length; const ncCapa=ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.action||r.capa||r.actionPlan||r.correctiveAction||'').trim()).length; const trDone=trRows.filter(isTrainingDone).length; const trProgress=trRows.filter(isTrainingProgress).length; const trOpen=Math.max(0,trRows.length-trDone-trProgress); const data={ incoming:{fail:sumFail(inRows),ncr:ncIncoming,hold:inRows.filter(r=>String(safeCalcJ(r.items||[])||r.judge||'').includes('보류')).length,capa:ncCapa}, process:{fail:sumFail(prRows),ncr:ncProcess,repeat:0,capa:ncCapa}, shipment:{fail:sumFail(shRows),ncr:ncShipment,repeat:0,capa:ncCapa}, nonconform:{ncr:ncRows.length,capa:ncCapa,open:ncOpen}, training:{done:trDone,progress:trProgress,open:trOpen} }; Object.entries(numbers).forEach(([key,val])=>{ document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-count="${key}"]`).forEach(el=>{el.textContent=val;}); document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-note="${key}"]`).forEach(el=>{el.textContent=labels[key]||`전체 ${val}건`;}); }); Object.entries(data).forEach(([key,obj])=>{ Object.entries(obj).forEach(([k,v])=>setBreak(key,k,v)); setDonutSegments(key,numbers[key],Object.values(obj)); }); } /* ═══ DASHBOARD ═══ */ function setTextSafe(id,val){ const el=$(id); if(el) el.textContent=val; } function setTrendSafe(id,c,pp){ const el=$(id); if(!el) return; const s=(!pp)?(c?'신규':'-'):(((Math.round((c-pp)/pp*100))>=0?'+':'')+Math.round((c-pp)/pp*100)+'%'); el.textContent=s; el.className='trend '+(s.startsWith('+')?'up':s.startsWith('-')?'down':'neutral'); } function recordDateOf(r){ const picked=pickRecordDate(r); if(picked) return picked; const raw=String(r?.date||r?.workDate||r?.work_date||r?.inspectionDate||r?.inspection_date||r?.createdAt||r?.created_at||r?.ncDate||r?.nc_date||r?.trainingDate||r?.training_date||r?.reportDate||r?.report_date||'').trim(); if(!raw) return ''; const m=raw.match(/(\d{4})[-./년\s]*(\d{1,2})?[-./월\s]*(\d{1,2})?/); if(!m) return raw; const yy=m[1], mm=String(m[2]||'01').padStart(2,'0'), dd=String(m[3]||'01').padStart(2,'0'); return `${yy}-${mm}-${dd}`; } function countByYear(arr,yr){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(yr))).length; } function qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(yr))); } function qmesMonthIndex(r){ const d=recordDateOf(r); const m=d.match(/^\d{4}-(\d{2})/); return m?Number(m[1])-1:-1; } function qmesCountForYearMonth(arr,yr,mi){ return qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr).filter(r=>qmesMonthIndex(r)===mi).length; } function qmesCountForQuarter(arr,yr,qi){ return qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr).filter(r=>{ const mi=qmesMonthIndex(r); return mi>=qi*3 && miString(r.status||'미결')!=='완결').length; setTextSafe('sumIncoming',iC);setTextSafe('sumProcess',pC);setTextSafe('sumShipment',sC);setTextSafe('sumWorklog',wC);setTextSafe('sumNc',ncOpen); setTrendSafe('sumIncomingRate',iC,iP);setTrendSafe('sumProcessRate',pC,pP);setTrendSafe('sumShipmentRate',sC,sP);setTrendSafe('sumWorklogRate',wC,wP); if(typeof updateQmesDonuts==='function') updateQmesDonuts({incoming:iC,process:pC,shipment:sC,nonconform:ncOpen,training:tC}); renderCharts(); } function renderCharts(){ const canvas=$('trendChart'); if(!canvas || !window.Chart) return; let y=Number(($('dashYear')&&$('dashYear').value)||new Date().getFullYear()); const allTrendRows=[...(Array.isArray(state.incoming)?state.incoming:[]),...(Array.isArray(state.process)?state.process:[]),...(Array.isArray(state.shipment)?state.shipment:[])]; const availableYears=[...new Set(allTrendRows.map(r=>recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4)).filter(v=>/^\d{4}$/.test(v)))].map(Number).sort((a,b)=>b-a); if(availableYears.length && !allTrendRows.some(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y)))) y=availableYears[0]; const mode=window.qmesTrendMode||'month'; const makeGradient=(ctx,color)=>{ const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,320); if(color==='blue'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(37,99,235,.30)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(37,99,235,.02)');} if(color==='purple'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(139,92,246,.25)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(139,92,246,.02)');} if(color==='orange'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(249,115,22,.25)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(249,115,22,.02)');} if(color==='green'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(16,185,129,.24)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(16,185,129,.02)');} return g; }; let labels=[], incoming=[], process=[], shipment=[], titleSuffix='월간'; if(mode==='quarter'){ labels=['1분기','2분기','3분기','4분기']; incoming=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.incoming,y,i)); process=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.process,y,i)); shipment=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.shipment,y,i)); titleSuffix='분기'; }else if(mode==='year'){ labels=Array.from({length:5},(_,i)=>String(y-4+i)); incoming=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.incoming,yy)); process=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.process,yy)); shipment=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.shipment,yy)); titleSuffix='연간'; }else{ labels=['1월','2월','3월','4월','5월','6월','7월','8월','9월','10월','11월','12월']; incoming=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.incoming,y,i)); process=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.process,y,i)); shipment=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.shipment,y,i)); titleSuffix='월간'; } const inRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.incoming)?state.incoming:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.incoming,y); const prRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.process)?state.process:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.process,y); const shRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.shipment)?state.shipment:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.shipment,y); updateTrendKpis(inRows,prRows,shRows); const tag=document.querySelector('#qmesTrendSlot .qmes-trend-wide .tag'); if(tag) tag.textContent=titleSuffix.toUpperCase(); const unit=document.getElementById('trendUnitText'); if(unit) unit.textContent=mode==='year'?'(최근 5년 / 단위: 건)':'(단위: 건)'; document.querySelectorAll('[data-trend-mode]').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',(b.dataset.trendMode||'month')===mode)); safeDestroyChart('trendChart'); const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); const maxVal=Math.max(1,...incoming,...process,...shipment); const pointLabelPlugin={ id:'qmesPointLabel', afterDatasetsDraw(chart){ const {ctx}=chart; ctx.save(); ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='bottom'; ctx.font='700 11px Inter, sans-serif'; chart.data.datasets.forEach((ds,di)=>{ const meta=chart.getDatasetMeta(di); meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{ const val=Number(ds.data[i]||0); if(!val) return; ctx.fillStyle=ds.borderColor; ctx.fillText(String(val),pt.x,pt.y-7-(di*2)); }); }); ctx.restore(); } }; state.charts.trend=new Chart(canvas,{ type:'line', data:{ labels, datasets:[ {label:'수입검사 (IQC)',data:incoming,borderColor:'#2563eb',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'blue'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5}, {label:'공정검사 (PQC)',data:process,borderColor:'#8b5cf6',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'purple'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5}, {label:'출하검사 (OQC)',data:shipment,borderColor:'#f97316',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'orange'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5} ] }, plugins:[pointLabelPlugin], options:{ responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false}, plugins:{ legend:{position:'top',align:'center',labels:{font:{size:12,weight:'800'},boxWidth:10,boxHeight:10,usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'rectRounded',padding:18}}, tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(15,23,42,.92)',padding:12,titleFont:{weight:'900'},bodyFont:{weight:'800'},callbacks:{label:(ctx)=>`${ctx.dataset.label}: ${ctx.parsed.y}건`}} }, scales:{ y:{beginAtZero:true,suggestedMax:maxVal+1,ticks:{precision:0,stepSize:1,font:{size:11,weight:'800'},color:'#64748b'},grid:{color:'rgba(15,23,42,.07)',drawBorder:false}}, x:{offset:false,ticks:{font:{size:11,weight:'800'},color:'#64748b'},grid:{display:false}} } } }); window.__chartStore['trendChart']=state.charts.trend; setTimeout(()=>{try{state.charts.trend.resize();}catch(e){}},80); } function calcInstrumentNext(){ const last=$('instrumentLastCal')?.value||''; const cycle=$('instrumentCycle')?.value||''; if(last&&cycle&&$('instrumentNextCal')){ $('instrumentNextCal').value=addMonthsToDate(last,cycle); } updateInstrumentStatusByDate(); } function updateInstrumentStatusByDate(){ const next=$('instrumentNextCal')?.value||''; const cur=$('instrumentStatus')?.value||'정상'; const auto=instrumentAutoStatus(next,cur); if($('instrumentStatus'))$('instrumentStatus').value=auto; } async function saveInstrument(){ const id=$('instrumentEditId').value||''; const p={ id, name:$('instrumentName').value.trim(), no:$('instrumentNo').value.trim(), model:$('instrumentModel').value.trim(), maker:$('instrumentMaker').value.trim(), location:$('instrumentLocation').value.trim(), cycle:$('instrumentCycle').value.trim()||'12', lastCal:$('instrumentLastCal').value, nextCal:$('instrumentNextCal').value, status:instrumentAutoStatus($('instrumentNextCal').value,$('instrumentStatus').value), remark:$('instrumentRemark').value.trim(), photo:$('instrumentPhoto')?.value.trim()||'' }; if(!p.name||!p.no){alert('측정기명과 관리번호는 필수입니다.');return;} const isExisting=!!id&&state.instruments.some(x=>String(x.id)===String(id)); const {res,data}=await api(isExisting?`/api/instruments/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`:'/api/instruments',{ method:isExisting?'PUT':'POST', body:JSON.stringify(p) }); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){alert(data?.message||'측정기 저장에 실패했습니다.');return;} await loadInstruments();clearInstrument();alert('저장되었습니다.'); } function clearInstrument(){ ['instrumentEditId','instrumentName','instrumentNo','instrumentModel','instrumentMaker','instrumentLocation','instrumentLastCal','instrumentNextCal','instrumentPhoto','instrumentRemark'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value='';}); if($('instrumentPhotoFile'))$('instrumentPhotoFile').value=''; renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(); if($('instrumentCycle'))$('instrumentCycle').value='12'; if($('instrumentStatus'))$('instrumentStatus').value='정상'; } function editInstrument(id){ const r=state.instruments.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return; $('instrumentEditId').value=r.id;$('instrumentName').value=r.name||'';$('instrumentNo').value=r.no||'';$('instrumentModel').value=r.model||'';$('instrumentMaker').value=r.maker||'';$('instrumentLocation').value=r.location||'';$('instrumentCycle').value=r.cycle||'12';$('instrumentLastCal').value=r.lastCal||'';$('instrumentNextCal').value=r.nextCal||'';$('instrumentStatus').value=instrumentAutoStatus(r.nextCal,r.status);if($('instrumentPhoto'))$('instrumentPhoto').value=instrumentPhotoSrc(r);$('instrumentRemark').value=r.remark||'';renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(); } async function deleteInstrument(id){ if(!confirm('삭제하시겠습니까?'))return; const {res,data}=await api(`/api/instruments/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`,{method:'DELETE'}); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){alert(data?.message||'삭제에 실패했습니다.');return;} await loadInstruments(); } /* ═══ SAVE ═══ */ async function saveIqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('iqc'); const p={date:$('incomingDate').value,lot:$('incomingLot').value.trim(),supplier:$('incomingSupplier').value.trim(),item:$('incomingItem').value.trim(),inspector:sp.writer.name,incomingQty:$('incomingQty').value,checkQty:$('incomingCheckQty').value,failQty:$('incomingFailQty').value,items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.incomingItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('incomingEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/iqc/${id}`:'/api/iqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearIqc();await loadIncoming();renderSummary();} } async function savePqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('pqc'); const p={date:$('processDate').value,lot:$('processLot').value.trim(),product:$('processProduct').value.trim(),visual:$('processLine').value.trim(),solid:sp.writer.name,particle:$('processShift').value.trim(),qty:$('processQty').value,failQty:$('processFailQty').value,items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.processItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('processEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/pqc/${id}`:'/api/pqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearPqc();await loadProcess();renderSummary();} } async function saveOqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('oqc'); const p={date:$('shipmentDate').value,customer:$('shipmentCustomer').value.trim(),product:$('shipmentProduct').value.trim(),lot:$('shipmentLot').value.trim(),visual:sp.writer.name,qty:$('shipmentQty').value,failQty:$('shipmentFailQty').value,package:$('shipmentRemark').value.trim(),items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.shipmentItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('shipmentEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/oqc/${id}`:'/api/oqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearOqc();await loadShipment();renderSummary();} } async function saveNc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('nc'); const p={ncDate:$('ncDate').value,ncNo:$('ncNo').value.trim(),ncType:$('ncType').value,dept:$('ncDept').value.trim(),lot:$('ncLot').value.trim(),item:$('ncItem').value.trim(),qty:$('ncQty').value,issue:$('ncIssue').value.trim(),cause:$('ncCause').value.trim(),action:$('ncAction').value.trim(),actionDate:$('ncActionDate').value||null,verify:$('ncVerify').value.trim(),verifyDate:$('ncVerifyDate').value||null,owner:$('ncOwner').value.trim(),status:$('ncStatus').value,signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('ncEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/nonconform/${id}`:'/api/nonconform',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearNc();await loadNonconform();renderSummary();} } async function saveSupplier(){ const p={name:$('supplierName').value.trim(),manager:$('supplierManager').value.trim(),phone:$('supplierPhone').value.trim(),category:$('supplierCategory').value.trim(),status:$('supplierStatus').value.trim()}; const id=$('supplierEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/suppliers/${id}`:'/api/suppliers',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearSupplier();await loadSuppliers();} } async function saveWorklog(){ const p={workDate:$('worklogDate').value,finishedLot:$('worklogFinishedLot').value.trim(),worker:$('worklogWorker').value.trim(),planQty:$('worklogPlanQty').value.trim(),prodQty:$('worklogProdQty').value.trim(),failQty:$('worklogFailQty').value.trim(),remark:$('worklogRemark').value.trim(),flowSet:$('worklogFlowSet').value.trim(),flowActual:$('worklogFlowActual').value.trim(),tempSet:$('worklogTempSet').value.trim(),tempActual:$('worklogTempActual').value.trim(),pressSet:$('worklogPressSet').value.trim(),pressActual:$('worklogPressActual').value.trim(),materials:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.worklogMaterialDrafts))}; const id=$('worklogEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/worklog/${id}`:'/api/worklog',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.');if(data?.success){clearWorklog();await loadWorklog();renderSummary();} } async function saveUser(){ const id=$('userEditId').value; const p={name:$('userName').value.trim(),email:$('userEmail').value.trim(),department:$('userDepartment').value.trim(),title:$('userTitle').value.trim(),role:$('userRole').value,status:$('userStatus').value,password:$('userPassword').value.trim()}; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/admin/users/${id}`:'/api/admin/users',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'저장되었습니다.'); if(data?.success){clearUser();await loadAdminUsers();await loadSignableUsers();} } /* ═══ CLEAR ═══ */ function clearIqc(){['incomingEditId','incomingLot','incomingSupplier','incomingItem','incomingQty','incomingCheckQty','incomingFailQty'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('incomingDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('iqc');state.incomingItemDrafts=defIqc();renderIqcItems();} function clearPqc(){['processEditId','processLot','processLine','processShift','processProduct','processQty','processFailQty'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('processDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('pqc');state.processItemDrafts=defPqc();renderPqcItems();} function clearOqc(){['shipmentEditId','shipmentCustomer','shipmentProduct','shipmentLot','shipmentQty','shipmentFailQty','shipmentRemark'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('shipmentDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('oqc');state.shipmentItemDrafts=defOqc();renderOqcItems();} function clearNc(){['ncEditId','ncNo','ncDept','ncLot','ncItem','ncQty','ncIssue','ncCause','ncAction','ncActionDate','ncVerify','ncVerifyDate','ncOwner'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('ncDate').value=todayKST();$('ncType').value='';$('ncStatus').value='미결';clearSign('nc');} function clearSupplier(){['supplierEditId','supplierName','supplierManager','supplierPhone','supplierCategory','supplierStatus'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');} function clearWorklog(){['worklogEditId','worklogFinishedLot','worklogWorker','worklogPlanQty','worklogProdQty','worklogFailQty','worklogRemark','worklogFlowSet','worklogFlowActual','worklogTempSet','worklogTempActual','worklogPressSet','worklogPressActual'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('worklogDate').value=todayKST();state.worklogMaterialDrafts=[];renderWorklogMats();} function clearUser(){['userEditId','userName','userEmail','userDepartment','userTitle','userPassword'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('userRole').value='user';$('userStatus').value='APPROVED';} /* ═══ EDIT ═══ */ function editIncoming(id){const r=state.incoming.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('incomingEditId').value=r.id;$('incomingDate').value=r.date||'';$('incomingLot').value=r.lot||'';$('incomingSupplier').value=r.supplier||'';$('incomingItem').value=r.item||'';$('incomingQty').value=r.incomingQty||'';$('incomingCheckQty').value=r.checkQty||'';$('incomingFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';state.incomingItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defIqc();renderIqcItems();restoreSign('iqc',r);} function editProcess(id){const r=state.process.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('processEditId').value=r.id;$('processDate').value=r.date||'';$('processLot').value=r.lot||'';$('processLine').value=r.line||'';$('processShift').value=r.shift||'';$('processProduct').value=r.product||'';$('processQty').value=r.qty||'';$('processFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';state.processItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defPqc();renderPqcItems();restoreSign('pqc',r);} function editShipment(id){const r=state.shipment.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('shipmentEditId').value=r.id;$('shipmentDate').value=r.date||'';$('shipmentCustomer').value=r.customer||'';$('shipmentProduct').value=r.product||'';$('shipmentLot').value=r.lot||'';$('shipmentQty').value=r.qty||'';$('shipmentFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';$('shipmentRemark').value=r.package||'';state.shipmentItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defOqc();renderOqcItems();restoreSign('oqc',r);} function editNc(id){ const r=state.nonconform.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return; $('ncEditId').value=r.id;$('ncDate').value=r.ncDate||'';$('ncNo').value=r.ncNo||'';$('ncType').value=r.ncType||'';$('ncDept').value=r.dept||'';$('ncLot').value=r.lot||'';$('ncItem').value=r.item||'';$('ncQty').value=r.qty||0;$('ncIssue').value=r.issue||'';$('ncCause').value=r.cause||'';$('ncAction').value=r.action||'';$('ncActionDate').value=r.actionDate||'';$('ncVerify').value=r.verify||'';$('ncVerifyDate').value=r.verifyDate||'';$('ncOwner').value=r.owner||'';$('ncStatus').value=r.status||'미결'; restoreSign('nc',r); $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-page="nonconform"]')?.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));$('page-nonconform').classList.add('active'); } function editSupplier(id){const r=state.suppliers.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('supplierEditId').value=r.id;$('supplierName').value=r.name||'';$('supplierManager').value=r.manager||'';$('supplierPhone').value=r.phone||'';$('supplierCategory').value=r.category||'';$('supplierStatus').value=r.status||'';} function editWorklog(id){const r=state.worklog.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('worklogEditId').value=r.id;$('worklogDate').value=r.workDate||'';$('worklogFinishedLot').value=r.finishedLot||'';$('worklogWorker').value=r.worker||'';$('worklogPlanQty').value=r.planQty||'';$('worklogProdQty').value=r.prodQty||'';$('worklogFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';$('worklogRemark').value=r.remark||'';$('worklogFlowSet').value=r.flowSet||'';$('worklogFlowActual').value=r.flowActual||'';$('worklogTempSet').value=r.tempSet||'';$('worklogTempActual').value=r.tempActual||'';$('worklogPressSet').value=r.pressSet||'';$('worklogPressActual').value=r.pressActual||'';state.worklogMaterialDrafts=Array.isArray(r.materials)?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.materials)):[];renderWorklogMats();} function editUser(id){const r=state.adminUsers.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('userEditId').value=r.id;$('userName').value=r.name||'';$('userEmail').value=r.email||'';$('userDepartment').value=r.department||'';$('userTitle').value=r.title||'';$('userRole').value=r.role||'user';$('userStatus').value=r.status||'APPROVED';$('userPassword').value='';} /* ═══ DELETE ═══ */ async function delApi(url,msg,reload){if(!confirm(msg))return;const{data}=await api(url,{method:'DELETE'});alert(data?.message||'삭제되었습니다.');if(data?.success)await reload();} /* ═══ WORKLOG MATERIALS ═══ */ function renderWorklogMats(){ const tb=$('worklogMaterialsTable'); if(!tb)return; if(!state.worklogMaterialDrafts.length){tb.innerHTML=`원료 행이 없습니다.`;return;} tb.innerHTML=state.worklogMaterialDrafts.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}`).join(''); } function addWorklogMat(){state.worklogMaterialDrafts.push({material:'',supName:'',lotNo:'',inputQty:'',inputTime:''});renderWorklogMats();} /* ═══ SPC / 공정능력 분석 - 평가보고서 통합형 ═══ */ const SPC_SPECS={ '점도':{lsl:1200, target:1500, usl:1800, unit:'cP', spec:'1,500 ± 300 cP', mode:'both', report:'VIS-2026-001', capabilityLabel:'Cpk'}, '고형분':{lsl:19.0, target:20.0, usl:21.0, unit:'wt.%', spec:'20.0 ± 1.0 wt.%', mode:'both', report:'SOLID-2026-001', capabilityLabel:'Cpk'}, '수분':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:2000, unit:'ppm', spec:'≤ 2,000 ppm', mode:'upper', report:'MOIST-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, 'Dmax':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:10.0, unit:'μm', spec:'≤ 10.0 μm', mode:'upper', report:'DMAX-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, '접착력':{lsl:400, target:'', usl:'', unit:'gf/12.7mm', spec:'≥ 400 gf/12.7mm', mode:'lower', report:'ADH-2026-001', oneSided:'lower', capabilityLabel:'Cpl', convert:'adhesion'}, '절연저항':{lsl:200, target:'', usl:'', unit:'MΩ / OVER FLOW', spec:'≥ 200 MΩ 또는 OVER FLOW', mode:'overflow', report:'IR-2026-001', oneSided:'lower', capabilityLabel:'Pass/Fail'}, '절연액 팽윤성':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:120, unit:'%', spec:'≤ 120 %', mode:'upper', report:'SWELL-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, '팽윤성':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:120, unit:'%', spec:'≤ 120 %', mode:'upper', report:'SWELL-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'} }; const SPC_CONST={2:{A2:1.88,D3:0,D4:3.267,d2:1.128},3:{A2:1.023,D3:0,D4:2.574,d2:1.693},4:{A2:0.729,D3:0,D4:2.282,d2:2.059},5:{A2:0.577,D3:0,D4:2.115,d2:2.326},6:{A2:0.483,D3:0,D4:2.004,d2:2.534},7:{A2:0.419,D3:0.076,D4:1.924,d2:2.704},8:{A2:0.373,D3:0.136,D4:1.864,d2:2.847},9:{A2:0.337,D3:0.184,D4:1.816,d2:2.970},10:{A2:0.308,D3:0.223,D4:1.777,d2:3.078}}; function fmtNum(v,d=3){return Number.isFinite(v)?Number(v).toLocaleString('ko-KR',{maximumFractionDigits:d,minimumFractionDigits:d}).replace(/\.000$/,''):'-';} function normCdf(x){return 0.5*(1+erf(x/Math.SQRT2));} function erf(x){const sign=x>=0?1:-1;x=Math.abs(x);const a1=0.254829592,a2=-0.284496736,a3=1.421413741,a4=-1.453152027,a5=1.061405429,p=0.3275911;const t=1/(1+p*x);const y=1-(((((a5*t+a4)*t)+a3)*t+a2)*t+a1)*t*Math.exp(-x*x);return sign*y;} function spcBadge(j){const cls=(j==='관리양호'||j==='합격'||j==='우수'||j==='양호')?'pass':(j==='주의'||j==='조치필요')?'hold':'fail';return `${esc(j||'-')}`;} function spcPill(j){const cls=(j==='관리양호'||j==='합격'||j==='PASS')?'good':(j==='검토'||j==='조치필요')?'warn':'bad';return `${esc(j||'-')}`;} function spcRows(){return state.spcRows||[];} function spcFlatValues(rows=spcRows()){ return rows.flatMap(r=>(r.values||[]) .map(v=>typeof cellNum==='function'?cellNum(v):(String(v??'').trim()===''?NaN:Number(v))) .filter(Number.isFinite) ); } function spcGetSpec(){const item=$('spcItem')?.value||'Dmax';const base=SPC_SPECS[item]||SPC_SPECS['Dmax'];return {...base,item,lsl:$('spcLsl')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcLsl')?.value),target:$('spcTarget')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcTarget')?.value),usl:$('spcUsl')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcUsl')?.value),unit:$('spcUnit')?.value||base.unit,criteria:Number($('spcCpkStd')?.value||1.33),n:Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5),A2:Number($('spcA2')?.value||0.577),D3:Number($('spcD3')?.value||0),D4:Number($('spcD4')?.value||2.115),d2:Number($('spcD2')?.value||2.326)};} function applySpcSpec(){const item=$('spcItem')?.value||'Dmax';const spec=SPC_SPECS[item]||SPC_SPECS['Dmax'];if($('spcLsl'))$('spcLsl').value=spec.lsl;if($('spcTarget'))$('spcTarget').value=spec.target;if($('spcUsl'))$('spcUsl').value=spec.usl;if($('spcUnit'))$('spcUnit').value=spec.unit;if($('spcProcess'))$('spcProcess').value=spec.spec;if($('spcReportNo')&&!$('spcReportNo').value)$('spcReportNo').value=spec.report;if($('spcSpecText'))$('spcSpecText').textContent=spec.spec;const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5);const c=SPC_CONST[n]||SPC_CONST[5];if($('spcA2'))$('spcA2').value=c.A2;if($('spcD3'))$('spcD3').value=c.D3;if($('spcD4'))$('spcD4').value=c.D4;if($('spcD2'))$('spcD2').value=c.d2;spcRecalc(false);} function parseSpcValues(){const txt=($('spcValues')?.value||'').replace(/,/g,' ');return txt.split(/[\s\t\n\r]+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean).map(x=>Number(x)).filter(Number.isFinite);} function spcSetRowsFromFlat(values,lots=[]){const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5);state.spcRows=[];for(let i=0;iv===0||v>=spec.lsl);return values.every(v=>(!Number.isFinite(spec.lsl)||v>=spec.lsl)&&(!Number.isFinite(spec.usl)||v<=spec.usl));} function calcSpc(rows=spcRows(),spec=spcGetSpec()){ const values=spcFlatValues(rows);const n=values.length;if(n<2)return null; const mean=values.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n;const variance=values.reduce((a,b)=>a+(b-mean)**2,0)/(n-1);const overall=Math.sqrt(variance);const min=Math.min(...values),max=Math.max(...values); const sub=rows.map((r,i)=>{const vals=(r.values||[]).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);const xb=vals.length?vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length:NaN;const rr=vals.length?Math.max(...vals)-Math.min(...vals):NaN;return {...r,idx:i+1,xbar:xb,range:rr,specJudge:spcSpecOK(vals,spec)?'관리양호':'불합격'};}).filter(r=>Number.isFinite(r.xbar)); const k=sub.length;const rbar=sub.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.range,0)/(k||1);const within=(spec.d2&&rbar>=0)?rbar/spec.d2:NaN; const xbarUcl=mean+spec.A2*rbar,xbarCl=mean,xbarLcl=mean-spec.A2*rbar,rUcl=spec.D4*rbar,rCl=rbar,rLcl=Math.max(0,spec.D3*rbar); let signals=[];sub.forEach(s=>{const badX=s.xbar>xbarUcl||s.xbarrUcl||s.range0){if(hasL&&hasU)cp=(spec.usl-spec.lsl)/(6*within);if(hasL)cpl=(mean-spec.lsl)/(3*within);if(hasU)cpu=(spec.usl-mean)/(3*within);if(hasL&&hasU)cpk=Math.min(cpl,cpu);else if(hasL)cpk=cpl;else if(hasU)cpk=cpu;} if(spec.mode!=='overflow'&&overall>0){if(hasL&&hasU)pp=(spec.usl-spec.lsl)/(6*overall);if(hasL)ppl=(mean-spec.lsl)/(3*overall);if(hasU)ppu=(spec.usl-mean)/(3*overall);if(hasL&&hasU)ppk=Math.min(ppl,ppu);else if(hasL)ppk=ppl;else if(hasU)ppk=ppu;} let ppmU=0,ppmL=0;if(overall>0&&spec.mode!=='overflow'){if(hasU)ppmU=(1-normCdf((spec.usl-mean)/overall))*1e6;if(hasL)ppmL=normCdf((spec.lsl-mean)/overall)*1e6;} const outU=hasU?values.filter(v=>v>spec.usl).length:0,outL=hasL?values.filter(v=>vv===0||v>=spec.lsl)?'관리양호':'불합격';else if(spec.mode==='upper')capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpu)?(cpu>=spec.criteria?'관리양호':'불합격'):'-'; else if(spec.mode==='lower')capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpl)?(cpl>=spec.criteria?'관리양호':'불합격'):'-'; else capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpk)?(cpk>=spec.criteria?'관리양호':'불합격'):'-'; const final=(specFinal==='관리양호'&&controlFinal==='관리양호'&&(capFinal==='관리양호'||capFinal==='-'))?'합격':'불합격'; const zBench=Number.isFinite(ppk)?ppk*3:NaN;return {n,k,mean,overall,within,min,max,rbar,sub,cp,cpu,cpl,cpk,pp,ppu,ppl,ppk,ppmU,ppmL,outU,outL,xbarUcl,xbarCl,xbarLcl,rUcl,rCl,rLcl,specFinal,controlFinal,capFinal,final,signals,zBench,values,spec}; } function spcCapabilityName(spec){ if(!spec)return '능력지수'; if(spec.mode==='upper')return 'Cpu (상한 단측)'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return 'Cpl (하한 단측)'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Pass/Fail'; return 'Cpk'; } function spcCapabilityValue(r){ if(!r)return NaN; if(r.spec?.mode==='upper')return r.cpu; if(r.spec?.mode==='lower')return r.cpl; if(r.spec?.mode==='overflow')return NaN; return r.cpk; } function spcOverallCapabilityName(spec){ if(!spec)return 'Ppk'; if(spec.mode==='upper')return 'Ppu (상한 단측)'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return 'Ppl (하한 단측)'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Pass/Fail'; return 'Ppk'; } function spcOverallCapabilityValue(r){ if(!r)return NaN; if(r.spec?.mode==='upper')return r.ppu; if(r.spec?.mode==='lower')return r.ppl; if(r.spec?.mode==='overflow')return NaN; return r.ppk; } function spcOneSidedNote(spec){ if(!spec)return ''; if(spec.mode==='upper')return '상한 단측 규격: LSL 없이 USL 기준으로 Cpu/Ppu를 사용합니다.'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return '하한 단측 규격: USL 없이 LSL 기준으로 Cpl/Ppl을 사용합니다.'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Overflow/하한 판정 항목: 수치 능력지수보다 규격 만족 여부를 우선 판정합니다.'; return '양측 규격: LSL/USL 기준으로 Cp/Cpk 및 Pp/Ppk를 사용합니다.'; } function spcRow(label,value,cls=''){return `${label}${value}`;} function renderSpcResult(r){const set=(id,v)=>{if($(id))$(id).textContent=v;};if(!r){['spcN','spcKpiK','spcMean','spcStd','spcCpk','spcJudge'].forEach(id=>set(id,'-'));if($('spcSpecModeNote'))$('spcSpecModeNote').textContent='단측 규격 항목은 Cp/Cpk 대신 Cpu 또는 Cpl 기준으로 판정합니다. 양측 규격 항목만 Cp/Cpk를 표시합니다.';return;}set('spcN',r.n);set('spcKpiK',r.k);set('spcMean',fmtNum(r.mean,3));set('spcStd',fmtNum(r.within,3));const capVal=spcCapabilityValue(r); set('spcCpk',Number.isFinite(capVal)?fmtNum(capVal,3):(r.spec?.mode==='overflow'?r.capFinal:'-')); const cpkCard=document.querySelector('#spcCpk')?.closest('.kpi')?.querySelector('.kpi-l'); if(cpkCard)cpkCard.textContent=spcCapabilityName(r.spec); set('spcJudge',r.final);if($('spcSpecModeNote'))$('spcSpecModeNote').textContent=spcOneSidedNote(r.spec);if($('spcCapabilityBody')){ const capName=spcCapabilityName(r.spec); const capVal=spcCapabilityValue(r); const overallName=spcOverallCapabilityName(r.spec); const overallVal=spcOverallCapabilityValue(r); let rows=[]; if(r.spec.mode==='both'){ rows=[ spcRow('Cp (군내)',Number.isFinite(r.cp)?fmtNum(r.cp,3):'-'), spcRow('Cpu',Number.isFinite(r.cpu)?fmtNum(r.cpu,3):'-'), spcRow('Cpl',Number.isFinite(r.cpl)?fmtNum(r.cpl,3):'-'), spcRow(spcCapabilityName(r.spec),Number.isFinite(spcCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcCapabilityValue(r),3):'-'), spcRow('Pp (전체)',Number.isFinite(r.pp)?fmtNum(r.pp,3):'-'), spcRow(spcOverallCapabilityName(r.spec),Number.isFinite(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r),3):'-') ]; }else if(r.spec.mode==='upper'||r.spec.mode==='lower'){ rows=[ spcRow(capName,Number.isFinite(capVal)?fmtNum(capVal,3):'-'), spcRow(overallName,Number.isFinite(overallVal)?fmtNum(overallVal,3):'-'), spcRow('Cp / Cpk','단측 규격 제외'), spcRow('Pp / Ppk','단측 규격 제외') ]; }else{ rows=[ spcRow('판정 방식','하한/Overflow 규격 만족 여부'), spcRow('능력지수','계산 제외'), spcRow('규격 판정',spcPill(r.specFinal)) ]; } rows=rows.concat([ spcRow('Within σ',fmtNum(r.within,3)+' '+r.spec.unit), spcRow('Overall σ',fmtNum(r.overall,3)+' '+r.spec.unit), spcRow('Z.Bench',Number.isFinite(r.zBench)?fmtNum(r.zBench,3):'-'), spcRow('기준',r.spec.mode==='both'?'Cpk ≥ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):(r.spec.mode==='upper'?'Cpu ≥ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):(r.spec.mode==='lower'?'Cpl ≥ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):r.spec.spec))), spcRow('규격 유형',spcOneSidedNote(r.spec)), spcRow('최종 판정',spcPill(r.capFinal)) ]); $('spcCapabilityBody').innerHTML=rows.join(''); } if($('spcControlBody'))$('spcControlBody').innerHTML=[spcRow('평균 관리상한',fmtNum(r.xbarUcl,3)),spcRow('평균 중심선',fmtNum(r.xbarCl,3)),spcRow('평균 관리하한',fmtNum(r.xbarLcl,3)),spcRow('범위 관리상한',fmtNum(r.rUcl,3)),spcRow('범위 중심선',fmtNum(r.rCl,3)),spcRow('범위 관리하한',fmtNum(r.rLcl,3)),spcRow('관리 상태',spcPill(r.controlFinal))].join('');if($('spcSpecBody'))$('spcSpecBody').innerHTML=[spcRow('상한규격',Number.isFinite(r.spec.usl)?fmtNum(r.spec.usl,3):'-'),spcRow('하한규격',Number.isFinite(r.spec.lsl)?fmtNum(r.spec.lsl,3):'-'),spcRow('상한 초과',r.outU+' ea'),spcRow('하한 미달',r.outL+' ea'),spcRow('상한 초과 PPM',fmtNum(r.ppmU,1)),spcRow('하한 미달 PPM',fmtNum(r.ppmL,1)),spcRow('규격 판정',spcPill(r.specFinal)),spcRow('최종 판정',spcPill(r.final))].join('');if($('spcReadinessBody'))$('spcReadinessBody').innerHTML=[$('spcCapabilityBody')?.innerHTML||''].join('');if($('spcThresholdBody'))$('spcThresholdBody').innerHTML=[spcRow('평균 관리상한',fmtNum(r.xbarUcl,3)),spcRow('평균 중심선',fmtNum(r.xbarCl,3)),spcRow('평균 관리하한',fmtNum(r.xbarLcl,3)),spcRow('범위 관리상한',fmtNum(r.rUcl,3)),spcRow('범위 중심선',fmtNum(r.rCl,3)),spcRow('범위 관리하한',fmtNum(r.rLcl,3)),spcRow('전체 평균',fmtNum(r.mean,3)),spcRow('평균 범위',fmtNum(r.rbar,3))].join('');if($('spcSignalBody'))$('spcSignalBody').innerHTML=(r.signals.length?r.signals:[ '특이 신호 없음' ]).map(x=>spcRow(x,r.signals.length?spcPill('조치필요'):spcPill('관리양호'))).join('');renderSpcReport(r);} function getSpcInputResult(showAlert=true){if(!state.spcRows||!state.spcRows.length){const vals=parseSpcValues();if(vals.length)spcSetRowsFromFlat(vals);}const r=calcSpc();if(!r){if(showAlert)alert('측정값을 입력하거나 엑셀/CSV를 업로드하세요.');renderSpcResult(null);return null;}if(r.n<100){if(showAlert)alert(`측정값은 100ea 이상 필요합니다. 현재 ${r.n}ea 입니다.`);renderSpcResult(r);renderSpcCharts(r);return null;}renderSpcResult(r);renderSpcCharts(r);renderSpcRawTable(false);return {result:r,values:r.values,lsl:r.spec.lsl,usl:r.spec.usl};} function spcRecalc(showAlert=false){const r=calcSpc();if(r){renderSpcResult(r);renderSpcCharts(r);renderSpcRawTable(false);}else renderSpcResult(null);if(showAlert&&(!r||r.n<100))alert('측정값 100ea 이상 입력 후 분석 가능합니다.');return r;} function renderSpcRawTable(rebuild=true){const head=$('spcRawHead'),tb=$('spcRawTable');if(!head||!tb)return;const spec=spcGetSpec();const n=spec.n||5;if(rebuild){}head.innerHTML='No.LOT'+Array.from({length:n},(_,i)=>`측정${i+1}`).join('')+'XBARR규격판정관리상태RULE비고편집';const r=calcSpc();const rows=(r?r.sub:spcRows());tb.innerHTML=rows.length?rows.map((row,i)=>{const vals=row.values||[];return `${i+1}${Array.from({length:n},(_,j)=>``).join('')}${fmtNum(row.xbar,3)}${fmtNum(row.range,3)}${spcPill(row.specJudge||'-')}${spcPill(row.controlJudge||'-')}${esc(row.rule||'-')}
`;}).join(''):eRow(12,'Raw데이터가 없습니다. 엑셀/CSV를 업로드하거나 행 추가를 눌러 입력하세요.');} function bindSpcRawEvents(){const tb=$('spcRawTable');if(!tb||tb.dataset.bound)return;tb.dataset.bound='1';tb.addEventListener('input',e=>{const t=e.target;if(t.dataset.spcVal!==undefined){const i=Number(t.dataset.spcIdx),j=Number(t.dataset.spcVal);if(!state.spcRows[i])return;state.spcRows[i].values[j]=Number(t.value);spcRecalc(false);}else if(t.dataset.spcLot!==undefined){const i=Number(t.dataset.spcLot);if(state.spcRows[i])state.spcRows[i].lot=t.value;}else if(t.dataset.spcRemark!==undefined){const i=Number(t.dataset.spcRemark);if(state.spcRows[i])state.spcRows[i].remark=t.value;}});tb.addEventListener('click',e=>{const edit=e.target.closest('[data-spc-edit]');if(edit){const i=Number(edit.dataset.spcEdit);const tr=edit.closest('tr');if(tr){tr.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});tr.querySelector('input[data-spc-lot], input[data-spc-idx]')?.focus();tr.style.outline='2px solid var(--pri)';tr.style.outlineOffset='-2px';setTimeout(()=>{tr.style.outline='';tr.style.outlineOffset='';},1200);}return;}const b=e.target.closest('[data-spc-del]');if(b){state.spcRows.splice(Number(b.dataset.spcDel),1);spcRecalc(false);}});} function addSpcRow(){const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5);state.spcRows=state.spcRows||[];state.spcRows.push({lot:$('spcLot')?.value||'',values:Array(n).fill(''),remark:''});renderSpcRawTable();} function deleteSelectedSpcRows(){const checks=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-spc-check]:checked')).map(x=>Number(x.dataset.spcCheck)).sort((a,b)=>b-a);checks.forEach(i=>state.spcRows.splice(i,1));spcRecalc(false);} function spcInferItemFromFileName(name){const s=String(name||'').toLowerCase();const pairs=[['점도','점도'],['고형분','고형분'],['수분','수분'],['dmax','Dmax'],['입도','Dmax'],['접착','접착력'],['절연저항','절연저항'],['절연액','절연액 팽윤성'],['팽윤','절연액 팽윤성'],['swelling','절연액 팽윤성']];for(const [key,item] of pairs){if(s.includes(key.toLowerCase()))return item;}return '';} function cellNum(v){if(v===null||v===undefined||v==='')return NaN;if(typeof v==='number')return Number.isFinite(v)?v:NaN;const s=String(v).replace(/,/g,'').trim();if(/^over\s*flow$/i.test(s))return 0;const m=s.match(/[-+]?\d*\.?\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\d+)?/);return
