m?Number(m[0]):NaN;} function extractSpcRowsFromRows(rows,item){ const lower=item==='접착력';let header=-1; for(let i=0;i=0?header+1:0;const out=[];const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5); const isHeaderLike=(row,lot,vals)=>{ const text=(row||[]).join('|').toLowerCase(); const seq=vals.length>=n&&vals.slice(0,n).every((v,i)=>Number(v)===i+1); return String(lot||'').trim().toLowerCase()==='lot'||text.includes('측정1')||text.includes('입력1')||seq; }; for(let i=start;iv*1000);}else vals=row.slice(2,7).map(cellNum).filter(Number.isFinite); if(isHeaderLike(row,lot,vals))continue; if(vals.length>=2)out.push({lot:String(lot||''),values:vals.slice(0,n),remark:''}); } return out; } function parseSpcCsvText(text){return String(text||'').split(/\r?\n/).map(line=>line.split(/,|\t|;/));} async function handleSpcFile(file){if(!file)return;const name=file.name||'';try{const inferred=spcInferItemFromFileName(name);if(inferred&&$('spcItem')){$('spcItem').value=inferred;applySpcSpec();}let rows=[],sheetName='';if(/\.csv$/i.test(name)){rows=parseSpcCsvText(await file.text());sheetName='CSV';}else{if(typeof XLSX==='undefined'){alert('엑셀 파서가 로드되지 않았습니다. CDN 차단 여부를 확인하세요.');return;}const wb=XLSX.read(await file.arrayBuffer(),{type:'array',cellDates:false,raw:true});sheetName=wb.SheetNames.find(n=>String(n).replace(/\s/g,'').toLowerCase().includes('rawdata_입력'))||wb.SheetNames.find(n=>String(n).toLowerCase().includes('raw'))||wb.SheetNames[0];rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[sheetName],{header:1,raw:true,blankrows:false});} const item=$('spcItem')?.value||inferred||'Dmax';const parsed=extractSpcRowsFromRows(rows,item);if(!parsed.length){alert('업로드 파일에서 Raw데이터 측정값을 찾지 못했습니다. Raw데이터_입력 시트를 확인하세요.');return;}state.spcRows=parsed;if($('spcK'))$('spcK').value=parsed.length;if(!$('spcLot').value.trim())$('spcLot').value=parsed.map(r=>r.lot).filter(Boolean).slice(0,4).join('~')||name.replace(/\.(xlsx|xls|csv)$/i,'');if($('spcReportNo')&&!$('spcReportNo').value){const spec=SPC_SPECS[item]||{};$('spcReportNo').value=spec.report||'SPC-2026-001';}const info=$('spcUploadInfo');if(info)info.textContent=`✓ ${name} / ${sheetName} (${parsed.length}개 부분군, ${spcFlatValues(parsed).length}ea)`;renderSpcRawTable();getSpcInputResult(false);} catch(e){console.error(e);alert('파일을 읽는 중 오류가 발생했습니다. 엑셀/CSV 형식을 확인하세요.');}} function bindSpcUpload(){const input=$('spcFileUpload'),box=$('spcUploadBox'),btn=$('spcFileSelectBtn');if(!input||!box||!btn)return;btn.onclick=()=>input.click();input.onchange=e=>handleSpcFile(e.target.files&&e.target.files[0]);['dragenter','dragover'].forEach(ev=>box.addEventListener(ev,e=>{e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();box.classList.add('dragover');}));['dragleave','drop'].forEach(ev=>box.addEventListener(ev,e=>{e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();box.classList.remove('dragover');}));box.addEventListener('drop',e=>{handleSpcFile(e.dataTransfer&&e.dataTransfer.files&&e.dataTransfer.files[0]);});} function chartLine(id,labels,datasets){const ctx=$(id);if(!ctx||!window.Chart)return;const key='spc_'+id;if(state.charts[key])state.charts[key].destroy();state.charts[key]=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels,datasets},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom'}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:false}}}});} function chartBar(id,labels,datasets){const ctx=$(id);if(!ctx||!window.Chart)return;const key='spc_'+id;if(state.charts[key])state.charts[key].destroy();state.charts[key]=new Chart(ctx,{type:'bar',data:{labels,datasets},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom'}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true}}}});} function renderSpcCharts(r){if(!r||!window.Chart)return;const labels=r.sub.map(x=>String(x.idx));const xbar=r.sub.map(x=>x.xbar),rr=r.sub.map(x=>x.range);chartLine('spcXbarChart',labels,[{label:'평균',data:xbar,tension:.25},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'중심선',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarCl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);chartLine('spcXbarChart2',labels,[{label:'평균',data:xbar,tension:.25},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'중심선',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarCl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);chartLine('spcRChart',labels,[{label:'범위',data:rr,tension:.25},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.rUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'중심선',data:labels.map(()=>r.rCl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.rLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);chartLine('spcRChart2',labels,[{label:'범위',data:rr,tension:.25},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.rUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'중심선',data:labels.map(()=>r.rCl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.rLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);const vals=r.values;const mn=Math.min(r.min,Number.isFinite(r.spec.lsl)?r.spec.lsl:r.min),mx=Math.max(r.max,Number.isFinite(r.spec.usl)?r.spec.usl:r.max);const bins=10,step=(mx-mn)/bins||1,hLabels=[],counts=Array(bins).fill(0);for(let i=0;i{let idx=Math.floor((v-mn)/step);if(idx<0)idx=0;if(idx>=bins)idx=bins-1;counts[idx]++;});['spcHistChart','spcHist2Chart','spcReportHist'].forEach(id=>chartBar(id,hLabels,[{label:'빈도',data:counts}]));chartBar('spcReadinessChart',['Cp','Cpu','Cpk','Pp','Ppk'],[{label:'지표',data:[r.cp,r.cpu,r.cpk,r.pp,r.ppk].map(x=>Number.isFinite(x)?x:0)},{label:'기준',data:[r.spec.criteria,r.spec.criteria,r.spec.criteria,r.spec.criteria,r.spec.criteria]}]);chartLine('spcIChart',vals.map((_,i)=>String(i+1)),[{label:'개별값',data:vals,tension:.15},{label:'상한규격',data:vals.map(()=>Number.isFinite(r.spec.usl)?r.spec.usl:null),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'하한규격',data:vals.map(()=>Number.isFinite(r.spec.lsl)?r.spec.lsl:null),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);const mr=vals.slice(1).map((v,i)=>Math.abs(v-vals[i]));chartLine('spcMRChart',mr.map((_,i)=>String(i+2)),[{label:'이동범위',data:mr,tension:.15}]);const sorted=[...vals].sort((a,b)=>a-b);const scatter데이터=sorted.map((v,i)=>({x:(i/(sorted.length-1))*6-3,y:v}));const sc=$('spcScatterChart');if(sc){const key='spc_spcScatterChart';if(state.charts[key])state.charts[key].destroy();state.charts[key]=new Chart(sc,{type:'scatter',data:{datasets:[{label:'데이터',data:scatter데이터}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom'}},scales:{x:{title:{display:true,text:'정규점수'}},y:{title:{display:true,text:r.spec.unit}}}}});}const last=vals.slice(-25);chartLine('spcLastChart',last.map((_,i)=>String(vals.length-last.length+i+1)),[{label:'최근 25개',data:last,tension:.2},{label:'상한규격',data:last.map(()=>Number.isFinite(r.spec.usl)?r.spec.usl:null),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);chartBar('spcRangeRankChart',r.sub.map(x=>'부분군 '+x.idx),[{label:'범위',data:rr}]);chartLine('spcOutlierChart',labels,[{label:'평균',data:xbar,tension:.2},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);chartLine('spcReportXbar',labels,[{label:'평균',data:xbar,tension:.25},{label:'관리상한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarUcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'중심선',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarCl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0},{label:'관리하한',data:labels.map(()=>r.xbarLcl),borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0}]);} function renderSpcReport(r){if(!r)return;if($('spcReportTitle'))$('spcReportTitle').textContent=`${r.spec.item} 측정 보고서`;const meta=[['보고서 번호',$('spcReportNo')?.value||'-'],['LOT',$('spcLot')?.value||'-'],['총 시료수',r.n+' ea'],['부분군 크기',r.spec.n],['부분군 수',r.k],['전체 평균',fmtNum(r.mean,3)+' '+r.spec.unit],['평균 범위',fmtNum(r.rbar,3)],['최소 / 최대',fmtNum(r.min,3)+' / '+fmtNum(r.max,3)]];if($('spcReportExec'))$('spcReportExec').innerHTML=meta.map(x=>spcRow(x[0],x[1])).join('');if($('spcReportBoundary'))$('spcReportBoundary').innerHTML=[spcRow('항목',r.spec.item),spcRow('기준',r.spec.spec),spcRow('하한규격',Number.isFinite(r.spec.lsl)?fmtNum(r.spec.lsl,3):'-'),spcRow('상한규격',Number.isFinite(r.spec.usl)?fmtNum(r.spec.usl,3):'-'),spcRow('단위',r.spec.unit),spcRow('규격 이탈',(r.outU+r.outL)+' ea'),spcRow('규격 판정',spcPill(r.specFinal))].join('');if($('spcReportReadiness'))$('spcReportReadiness').innerHTML=[spcRow('Cpu',fmtNum(r.cpu,3)),spcRow('Cpk',fmtNum(r.cpk,3)),spcRow('Ppk',fmtNum(r.ppk,3)),spcRow('군내 σ',fmtNum(r.within,3)),spcRow('전체 σ',fmtNum(r.overall,3)),spcRow('최종 판정',spcPill(r.final)),spcRow('관리 상태',spcPill(r.controlFinal)),spcRow('최종 운영',spcPill(r.capFinal))].join('');const n=r.spec.n;const head=$('spcReportHead'),tb=$('spcReportTable');if(head)head.innerHTML='No.LOT'+Array.from({length:n},(_,i)=>`측정${i+1}`).join('')+'XBARR판정';if(tb)tb.innerHTML=r.sub.map(row=>`${row.idx}${esc(row.lot||'')}${Array.from({length:n},(_,i)=>`${fmtNum(row.values[i],3)}`).join('')}${fmtNum(row.xbar,3)}${fmtNum(row.range,3)}${spcPill(row.controlJudge==='관리양호'?row.specJudge:row.controlJudge)}`).join('');} function switchSpcView(view){document.querySelectorAll('.spc-pro-nav').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.spcView===view));document.querySelectorAll('.spc-view').forEach(v=>v.classList.remove('active'));const el=$(`spcView-${view}`);if(el)el.classList.add('active');setTimeout(()=>{const r=calcSpc();if(r)renderSpcCharts(r);},80);} function bindSpcViews(){document.querySelectorAll('.spc-pro-nav').forEach(b=>{if(!b.dataset.bound){b.dataset.bound='1';b.addEventListener('click',()=>switchSpcView(b.dataset.spcView));}});} function loadSpcReports(){const raw=localStorage.getItem('namo_qms_spc_reports');try{state.spcReports=raw?JSON.parse(raw):[];}catch(e){state.spcReports=[];}renderSpcTable();} function saveSpcLocal(){localStorage.setItem('namo_qms_spc_reports',JSON.stringify(state.spcReports));} function renderSpcTable(){const tb=$('spcTable');if(!tb)return;if(!state.spcReports.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(11);return;}tb.innerHTML=state.spcReports.map(r=>`${esc(r.date||'')}${esc(r.reportNo||'')}${esc(r.lot||'')}${esc(r.item||'')}${r.n||0}${fmtNum(r.mean)}${fmtNum(r.within)}${Number.isFinite(spcCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcCapabilityValue(r),3):(r.capFinal||'-')}${Number.isFinite(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r),3):'-'}${spcBadge(r.final||r.judge)}
`).join('');} function saveSpc(){const got=getSpcInputResult(true);if(!got)return;const r=got.result;const id=$('spcEditId').value||String(Date.now());const p={id,date:$('spcDate').value||todayKST(),reportNo:$('spcReportNo').value.trim(),product:$('spcProduct').value.trim(),lot:$('spcLot').value.trim(),process:$('spcProcess').value.trim(),item:$('spcItem').value,unit:r.spec.unit,lsl:r.spec.lsl,usl:r.spec.usl,target:r.spec.target,subgroup:r.spec.n,rows:spcRows(),values:r.values,n:r.n,k:r.k,mean:r.mean,within:r.within,overall:r.overall,cp:r.cp,cpu:r.cpu,cpl:r.cpl,cpk:r.cpk,pp:r.pp,ppk:r.ppk,final:r.final,judge:r.final,capabilityName:spcCapabilityName(r.spec),overallCapabilityName:spcOverallCapabilityName(r.spec)};const idx=state.spcReports.findIndex(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(idx>=0)state.spcReports[idx]=p;else state.spcReports.unshift(p);saveSpcLocal();renderSpcTable();$('spcEditId').value=id;alert('공정능력 분석 결과가 저장되었습니다.');} function clearSpc(){['spcEditId','spcProduct','spcLot','spcValues','spcUploadInfo'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value='';});if($('spcUploadInfo'))$('spcUploadInfo').textContent='';if($('spcDate'))$('spcDate').value=todayKST();state.spcRows=[];applySpcSpec();renderSpcRawTable();renderSpcResult(null);Object.keys(state.charts).filter(k=>k.startsWith('spc_')).forEach(k=>{try{state.charts[k]?.destroy();}catch(e){}state.charts[k]=null;});} function editSpc(id){const r=state.spcReports.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('spcEditId').value=r.id;$('spcDate').value=r.date||todayKST();$('spcProduct').value=r.product||'';$('spcLot').value=r.lot||'';$('spcProcess').value=r.process||'';$('spcItem').value=r.item||'Dmax';$('spcLsl').value=Number.isFinite(r.lsl)?r.lsl:'';$('spcUsl').value=Number.isFinite(r.usl)?r.usl:'';if($('spcTarget'))$('spcTarget').value=Number.isFinite(r.target)?r.target:'';$('spcUnit').value=r.unit||'';$('spcSubgroup').value=r.subgroup||5;if($('spcReportNo'))$('spcReportNo').value=r.reportNo||'';state.spcRows=r.rows||[];renderSpcRawTable();getSpcInputResult(false);document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-page="spc"]')?.click();} function deleteSpc(id){if(!confirm('삭제하시겠습니까?'))return;state.spcReports=state.spcReports.filter(x=>String(x.id)!==String(id));saveSpcLocal();renderSpcTable();} function downloadSpcJson(){const r=calcSpc();if(!r){alert('분석 데이터가 없습니다.');return;}const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify({meta:{date:$('spcDate')?.value,reportNo:$('spcReportNo')?.value,lot:$('spcLot')?.value,item:$('spcItem')?.value},result:r,rows:spcRows()},null,2)],{type:'application/json'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=($('spcReportNo')?.value||'spc_report')+'.json';a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);} function printSpcReport(){const area=$('spcReportArea');if(area)printEl(area);} /* ═══ EVENTS ═══ */ /* ═══ 교육 보고서: 메인 JS 통합 로직 ═══ */ const TRAINING_STORAGE_KEY='namo_qms_training_reports_v2'; let trainingPhotoDrafts=[]; function isTrainingDeleted(r){ const v=String(r?.deleted ?? r?.isDeleted ?? r?._deleted ?? r?.trash ?? r?.removed ?? '').toLowerCase(); const st=String(r?.status ?? r?.state ?? '').toUpperCase(); return v==='true'||v==='1'||v==='y'||st==='DELETED'||st==='TRASH'||st==='REMOVED'||st==='삭제'; } function normalizeTrainingReport(r){ return {...(r||{}),deleted:false,isDeleted:false,_deleted:false,status:(r&&r.status&&String(r.status).toUpperCase()!=='DELETED')?r.status:'ACTIVE'}; } function readTrainingReports(){ const fromState=Array.isArray(state.trainingReports)?state.trainingReports:[]; return fromState.filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)).map(normalizeTrainingReport); } function writeTrainingReports(list){ state.trainingReports=(list||[]).filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)).map(normalizeTrainingReport); try{localStorage.setItem(TRAINING_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(state.trainingReports));}catch(e){} } async function migrateLegacyTrainingToServerIfNeeded(serverList){ const marker='namo_qms_training_reports_migrated_to_server_v1'; if(Array.isArray(serverList)&&serverList.length>0)return false; if(localStorage.getItem(marker)==='1')return false; let legacy=[]; try{legacy=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(TRAINING_STORAGE_KEY)||'[]')||[];}catch(e){legacy=[];} legacy=(Array.isArray(legacy)?legacy:[]).filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)).map(normalizeTrainingReport); if(!legacy.length)return false; let migrated=0; for(const r of legacy){ if(!r||!txt(r.date)||!txt(r.title))continue; const payload={...r,no:r.no||r.reportNo||'',reportNo:r.no||r.reportNo||'',evalMethod:r.evalMethod||r.eval_method||'',photos:Array.isArray(r.photos)?r.photos:[],signWriter:r.signWriter||{},signReviewer:r.signReviewer||{},signApprover:r.signApprover||{}}; const {res}=await api('/api/training',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(payload)}); if(res.ok)migrated++; } if(migrated>0){localStorage.setItem(marker,'1');return true;} return false; } async function loadTrainingReports(){ const {res,data}=await api('/api/training'); if(res.ok&&data?.success){ let rows=(data.data||[]).filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)); const migrated=await migrateLegacyTrainingToServerIfNeeded(rows); if(migrated){ const again=await api('/api/training'); rows=(again.data?.data||rows).filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)); } state.trainingReports=rows.map(normalizeTrainingReport); }else{ try{ const raw=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(TRAINING_STORAGE_KEY)||'[]')||[]; state.trainingReports=(Array.isArray(raw)?raw:[]).filter(r=>!isTrainingDeleted(r)).map(normalizeTrainingReport); }catch(e){state.trainingReports=[];} } renderTrainingTable(); renderTrainingPreview(); } function trainingBadge(v){return v==='완료'?'완료':v==='미실시'?'미실시':'예정';} function trainingNow(){const d=new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Seoul'}));return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')} ${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')}`;} function trainingToday(){return typeof todayKST==='function'?todayKST():new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Seoul'})).toISOString().slice(0,10);} function trainingAttendCount(v){const n=String(v||'').split(/,|\n/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean).length;return n||'-';} function trainingSignName(role){const p=typeof getSignPayload==='function'?getSignPayload('training'):{};return (p&&p[role]&&p[role].name&&p[role].name!=='-')?p[role].name:'';} function readTrainingForm(){ const sign=typeof getSignPayload==='function'?getSignPayload('training'):{writer:{},reviewer:{},approver:{}}; const id=$('trainingEditId')?.value||('TR-'+Date.now()+'-'+Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,8)); const old=readTrainingReports().find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id))||{}; const isEdit=!!($('trainingEditId')?.value); const oldWriter=old.writer || old.signWriter?.name || ''; const oldSignWriter=old.signWriter || (oldWriter?{name:oldWriter,title:'',department:'',role:'writer'}:{}); return {id,date:$('trainingDate')?.value||'',no:$('trainingNo')?.value||'',type:$('trainingType')?.value||'',title:$('trainingTitle')?.value||'',place:$('trainingPlace')?.value||'',instructor:$('trainingInstructor')?.value||'',dept:$('trainingDept')?.value||'',hours:$('trainingHours')?.value||'',attendees:$('trainingAttendees')?.value||'',absentees:$('trainingAbsentees')?.value||'',external:$('trainingExternal')?.value||'',content:$('trainingContent')?.value||'',evalMethod:$('trainingEvalMethod')?.value||'',result:$('trainingResult')?.value||'완료',remark:$('trainingRemark')?.value||'',photos:trainingPhotoDrafts.slice(),writer:isEdit?oldWriter:(sign.writer?.name&&sign.writer.name!=='-'?sign.writer.name:''),reviewer:sign.reviewer?.name&&sign.reviewer.name!=='-'?sign.reviewer.name:'',approver:sign.approver?.name&&sign.approver.name!=='-'?sign.approver.name:'',signWriter:isEdit?oldSignWriter:(sign.writer||{}),signReviewer:sign.reviewer||{},signApprover:sign.approver||{},deleted:false,isDeleted:false,_deleted:false,status:'ACTIVE',updatedAt:trainingNow()}; } function ensureTrainingWriterLocked(record){ if(!record || !record.id)return; const oldWriter = record.signWriter || {}; const writerName = oldWriter.name || record.writer || ''; if(!writerName)return; const writerId = oldWriter.id || oldWriter.email || ('locked-training-writer-' + writerName); const writerObj = { id:writerId, name:writerName, title:oldWriter.title || record.writerTitle || '', department:oldWriter.department || record.writerDepartment || '', email:oldWriter.email || record.writerEmail || '', status:'APPROVED' }; if(!Array.isArray(state.signableUsers))state.signableUsers=[]; let addedWriter=false; if(!state.signableUsers.some(u => String(u.id) === String(writerObj.id))){ state.signableUsers.push(writerObj); addedWriter=true; } if(addedWriter && typeof buildSignGrid==='function'){ buildSignGrid('training'); } const writerSel = $('sg_training_writer'); if(writerSel){ let opt = Array.from(writerSel.options).find(o => String(o.value) === String(writerObj.id)); if(!opt){ opt = new Option(`${writerObj.name} (${writerObj.title || writerObj.department || '-'})`, writerObj.id); writerSel.add(opt); } writerSel.value = writerObj.id; writerSel.disabled = true; writerSel.title = '최초 작성자는 수정할 수 없습니다.'; } if(typeof restoreSignaturePad === 'function')restoreSignaturePad('training','writer',record.signWriter || writerObj); if(typeof onSignChange === 'function')onSignChange('training','writer'); } function fillTrainingForm(r={}){ const set=(id,v)=>{if($(id))$(id).value=v??'';}; set('trainingEditId',r.id||'');set('trainingDate',r.date||trainingToday());set('trainingNo',r.no||'');set('trainingType',r.type||'안전교육');set('trainingTitle',r.title||'');set('trainingPlace',r.place||'');set('trainingInstructor',r.instructor||'');set('trainingDept',r.dept||'');set('trainingHours',r.hours||'');set('trainingAttendees',r.attendees||'');set('trainingExternal',r.external||'');set('trainingAbsentees',r.absentees||'');set('trainingContent',r.content||'');set('trainingEvalMethod',r.evalMethod||'');set('trainingResult',r.result||'완료');set('trainingRemark',r.remark||''); trainingPhotoDrafts=Array.isArray(r.photos)?r.photos.slice():[]; if(typeof restoreSign==='function' && (r.signWriter||r.signReviewer||r.signApprover))restoreSign('training',r); else if(typeof clearSign==='function')clearSign('training'); setTimeout(()=>{ const writerSel=$('sg_training_writer'); if(r.id){ ensureTrainingWriterLocked(r); }else if(writerSel){ writerSel.disabled=false; writerSel.title=''; } renderTrainingPreview(); },0); renderTrainingPhotoCards();renderTrainingPreview(); } function clearTrainingReport(){fillTrainingForm({date:trainingToday(),type:'안전교육',result:'완료'});setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applySignPermissions==='function')applySignPermissions('training');},0);} function renderTrainingPhotoCards(){const box=$('trainingPhotoPreview');if(!box)return;box.innerHTML=trainingPhotoDrafts.map((p,i)=>`
`).join('');} function renderTrainingPreview(sourceRecord){ const r=sourceRecord?normalizeTrainingReport(sourceRecord):readTrainingForm(); const resultText=String(r.result||'완료'); const photos=(r.photos||[]).length?`
${r.photos.slice(0,2).map(p=>`
${esc(p.caption||'제목 없음')}
`).join('')}
`:'
첨부 사진 없음
'; const sw=r.signWriter||{}; const sr=r.signReviewer||{}; const sa=r.signApprover||{}; const writerName=sw.name||r.writer||''; const reviewerName=sr.name||r.reviewer||''; const approverRaw=sa.name||r.approver||''; const approverName=(String(approverRaw).trim()==='로그인 사용자'||String(approverRaw).trim()==='login-user')?'임흥배':approverRaw; const updatedAt=r.updatedAt||r.createdAt||''; const signHtml=(name,signObj)=>{ const hasName=!!String(name||'').trim(); const img=(signObj&&signObj.signImage)||''; if(hasName&&img)return ``; return hasName?'서명':''; }; const el=$('trainingPreviewSheet'); if(el){ el.className='training-preview-sheet training-form-v5'; el.innerHTML=`
NAMOChemical
교육 보고서
Namochemical QMS
교육일자${esc(r.date||'-')}보고서번호
교육구분${esc(r.type||'-')}교육명${esc(r.title||'-')}
장소${esc(r.place||'-')}강사${esc(r.instructor||'-')}
대상부서${esc(r.dept||'-')}교육시간${esc(r.hours||'-')}
평가방법${esc(r.evalMethod||'-')}평가결과${esc(resultText)}
1참석자
${esc(r.attendees||'-')}
2불참자
${esc(r.absentees||'-')}
3교육 내용
${esc(r.content||'-')}
4비고 / 개선사항
${esc(r.remark||'-')}
5교육 사진
${photos}
Namochemical QMS
1 / 1
`; } if($('trainingWriterText'))$('trainingWriterText').textContent=writerName; if($('trainingReviewerText'))$('trainingReviewerText').textContent=reviewerName; if($('trainingApproverText'))$('trainingApproverText').textContent=approverName; } async function saveTrainingReport(){ const r=readTrainingForm(); if(!r.date||!r.title||!r.content){alert('교육일자, 교육명, 교육 내용을 입력하세요.');return;} if(!r.writer){alert('작성자를 선택하세요.');return;} if(!r.no)r.no='EDU-'+r.date.replaceAll('-','')+'-'+String(readTrainingReports().length+1).padStart(3,'0'); const isExisting=readTrainingReports().some(x=>String(x.id)===String(r.id)); const {res,data}=await api(isExisting?`/api/training/${encodeURIComponent(r.id)}`:'/api/training',{ method:isExisting?'PUT':'POST', body:JSON.stringify(r) }); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){alert(data?.message||'교육 보고서 저장에 실패했습니다.');return;} if(data.data) r.id=data.data.id||r.id; await loadTrainingReports(); const saved=readTrainingReports().find(x=>String(x.id)===String(r.id))||r; fillTrainingForm(saved); renderTrainingTable(); if(typeof notify==='function'){ notify('교육보고서 저장 알림', `${saved.no||r.no||'교육보고서'} 저장이 완료되었습니다.`); }else{ alert('교육 보고서가 저장되었습니다.'); } } function editTraining(id){const r=readTrainingReports().find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(r){fillTrainingForm(r);document.querySelector('[data-page="training"]')?.click();$('trainingPrintArea')?.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});}} function printTraining(id){const r=readTrainingReports().find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;renderTrainingPreview(r);setTimeout(()=>printEl($('trainingPreviewSheet')),200);} async function deleteTraining(id){ if(!confirm('교육 보고서를 삭제하시겠습니까?'))return; const {res,data}=await api(`/api/training/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`,{method:'DELETE'}); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){ const now=trainingNow(); const list=readTrainingReports().filter(x=>String(x.id)!==String(id)); writeTrainingReports(list); try{ const deleted=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(TRAINING_DELETED_KEY)||'[]')||[]; if(!deleted.some(x=>String(x.id)===String(id))){ deleted.push({id,deletedAt:now}); localStorage.setItem(TRAINING_DELETED_KEY,JSON.stringify(deleted)); } }catch(e){} await loadTrainingReports(); }else{ await loadTrainingReports(); } renderTrainingTable();clearTrainingReport(); } function renderTrainingTable(){ const tb=$('trainingTable'); if(!tb)return; const list=readTrainingReports().slice().sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.date||0)-new Date(a.date||0)).slice(0,5); const personText=(v)=>String(v||'').trim()||'-'; const pickName=(...vals)=>personText(vals.find(v=>String(v||'').trim())); tb.innerHTML=list.length?list.map((r,i)=>{ const wfStatus=(typeof getWf==='function'&&typeof docId==='function')?getWf('training',docId('training',r),r):null; const writer=pickName(r.writer,r.signWriter?.name,r.createdBy); const reviewer=pickName(r.reviewer,r.signReviewer?.name,wfStatus?.reviewerName); const approver=pickName(r.approver,r.signApprover?.name,wfStatus?.approverName); const dept=personText(r.dept||r.department||r.targetDept); const target=personText(r.attendees||r.targetPerson||r.target||''); const deptTarget=target==='-'?dept:`${dept}
${esc(target).replace(/\n/g,'
')}`; const remark=personText(r.remark||r.period||r.trainingPeriod); return ` ${i+1} ${esc(r.date||'-')} ${deptTarget} ${esc(writer)} ${esc(reviewer)} ${esc(approver)}
${esc(remark)}
`; }).join(''):(typeof eRow==='function'?eRow(8,'교육 보고서가 없습니다.'):'교육 보고서가 없습니다.'); } function downloadTrainingCsv(){const headers=['교육일자','보고서번호','구분','교육명','장소','강사','대상부서','교육시간','참석자','불참자','교육내용','평가방법','평가결과','비고','교육사진수','교육사진설명','작성자','검토자','승인자'];const rows=readTrainingReports().map(r=>[r.date,r.no,r.type,r.title,r.place,r.instructor,r.dept,r.hours,r.attendees,r.absentees,r.content,r.evalMethod,r.result,r.remark,Array.isArray(r.photos)?r.photos.length:0,Array.isArray(r.photos)?r.photos.map(p=>p.caption||'').join('; '):'',r.writer,r.reviewer,r.approver]);const body=[headers,...rows].map(row=>row.map(v=>'"'+String(v??'').replaceAll('"','""')+'"').join(',')).join('\n');const blob=new Blob(['\ufeff'+body],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download='교육보고서_'+trainingToday()+'.csv';a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);} function bindTrainingEvents(){ if($('trainingSave')&&!window.__namoWfSavePatched)$('trainingSave').onclick=withSaving('training',$('trainingSave'),saveTrainingReport); if($('trainingReset'))$('trainingReset').onclick=clearTrainingReport; if($('trainingCsv'))$('trainingCsv').onclick=downloadTrainingCsv; if($('trainingPrint'))$('trainingPrint').onclick=()=>{renderTrainingPreview();printEl($('trainingPreviewSheet'));}; if($('trainingPreviewBtn'))$('trainingPreviewBtn').onclick=()=>{renderTrainingPreview();$('trainingPreviewCard')?.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});}; if($('trainingPhotoFiles'))$('trainingPhotoFiles').addEventListener('change',e=>{Array.from(e.target.files||[]).forEach(f=>{if(!f.type||!f.type.startsWith('image/'))return;const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=ev=>{trainingPhotoDrafts.push({src:ev.target.result,caption:f.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'')});renderTrainingPhotoCards();renderTrainingPreview();};reader.readAsDataURL(f);});e.target.value='';}); ['trainingDate','trainingNo','trainingType','trainingTitle','trainingPlace','trainingInstructor','trainingDept','trainingHours','trainingAttendees','trainingExternal','trainingAbsentees','trainingContent','trainingEvalMethod','trainingResult','trainingRemark'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).addEventListener('input',renderTrainingPreview);if($(id))$(id).addEventListener('change',renderTrainingPreview);}); document.addEventListener('input',e=>{const cap=e.target.closest?.('[data-training-photo-caption]');if(cap){const i=Number(cap.dataset.trainingPhotoCaption);if(trainingPhotoDrafts[i])trainingPhotoDrafts[i].caption=cap.value;renderTrainingPreview();}}); document.addEventListener('click',e=>{const del=e.target.closest?.('[data-training-photo-del]');if(del){trainingPhotoDrafts.splice(Number(del.dataset.trainingPhotoDel),1);renderTrainingPhotoCards();renderTrainingPreview();}}); document.addEventListener('change',e=>{if(e.target&&/^sg_training_(writer|reviewer|approver)$/.test(e.target.id))renderTrainingPreview();}); clearTrainingReport();renderTrainingTable(); } function onSafe(id,event,handler){ const el=$(id); if(!el) return; el.addEventListener(event,handler); } function clickSafe(id,handler){onSafe(id,'click',handler);} function bindEvents(){ const elSafe=id=>$(id); const clickSafe2=(id,fn)=>{const el=elSafe(id); if(el) el.onclick=fn;}; const onSafe2=(id,ev,fn)=>{const el=elSafe(id); if(el) el.addEventListener(ev,fn);}; clickSafe('tabLoginBtn',()=>openLoginTab('login')); clickSafe('tabSignupBtn',()=>openLoginTab('signup')); clickSafe('loginBtn',login); clickSafe('signupBtn',signup); onSafe('loginPassword','keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')login();}); onSafe('loginEmail','keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')login();}); onSafe('rememberLoginId','change',()=>{const emailEl=$('loginEmail'); if(!$('rememberLoginId').checked) localStorage.removeItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY); else if(emailEl&&emailEl.value.trim()) localStorage.setItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY,emailEl.value.trim());}); loadRememberedLoginId(); clickSafe('profileBtn',e=>{e.stopPropagation();const d=$('profileDropdown');if(d)d.classList.toggle('show');}); const homeLogo=$('homeLogo'); if(homeLogo){ homeLogo.onclick=goHome; homeLogo.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();goHome();}}); } clickSafe('logoutBtn',logout); clickSafe('openChangePassword',()=>{closeProfileMenu();openPwdModal();}); clickSafe('closePasswordModal',closePwdModal);clickSafe('cancelPasswordModal',closePwdModal);clickSafe('submitChangePassword',changePwd); clickSafe('openUserManage',()=>{closeProfileMenu();$$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));const n=$('usersNavBtn');if(n)n.classList.add('active');$$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));const p=$('page-users');if(p)p.classList.add('active');loadAdminUsers();}); document.addEventListener('click',e=>{const m=$('profileDropdown'),b=$('profileBtn');if(m&&b&&!m.contains(e.target)&&!b.contains(e.target))closeProfileMenu();}); clickSafe('closeLabelModal',()=>{const m=$('labelModal');if(m)m.classList.remove('show');});clickSafe('cancelLabelModal',()=>{const m=$('labelModal');if(m)m.classList.remove('show');});clickSafe('printLabelBtn',printLabel); clickSafe('openIncomingLabel',()=>openLabelModal('iqc',state.incoming));clickSafe('openProcessLabel',()=>openLabelModal('pqc',state.process));clickSafe('openShipmentLabel',()=>openLabelModal('oqc',state.shipment)); clickSafe('openReportLabel',()=>{const rt=$('reportType');const t=rt?rt.value:'iqc';openLabelModal(t,t==='iqc'?state.incoming:t==='pqc'?state.process:state.shipment);}); // IQC clickSafe2('incomingSave',withSaving('iqc',$('incomingSave'),saveIqc));clickSafe2('incomingReset',clearIqc); clickSafe2('addIncomingRow',()=>{state.incomingItemDrafts.push({item:'',spec:'',value:'',judge:'합격'});renderIqcItems();}); ['incomingDate','incomingLot','incomingSupplier','incomingItem','incomingQty','incomingCheckQty','incomingFailQty'].forEach(id=>onSafe2(id,'input',syncIqcPreview)); clickSafe2('printIncomingReport',()=>printEl($('incomingReportPreview'))); // PQC clickSafe2('processSave',withSaving('pqc',$('processSave'),savePqc));clickSafe2('processReset',clearPqc); clickSafe2('addProcessRow',()=>{state.processItemDrafts.push({item:'',spec:'',value:'',judge:'합격'});renderPqcItems();}); ['processDate','processLot','processLine','processShift','processProduct','processQty','processFailQty'].forEach(id=>onSafe2(id,'input',syncPqcPreview)); clickSafe2('printProcessReport',()=>{ syncPqcPreview(); setTimeout(()=>{ printEl($('processReportPreview')); },300); }); // OQC clickSafe2('shipmentSave',withSaving('oqc',$('shipmentSave'),saveOqc));clickSafe2('shipmentReset',clearOqc); clickSafe2('addShipmentRow',()=>{state.shipmentItemDrafts.push({item:'',spec:'',value:'',judge:'합격'});renderOqcItems();}); ['shipmentDate','shipmentCustomer','shipmentProduct','shipmentLot','shipmentQty','shipmentFailQty','shipmentRemark'].forEach(id=>onSafe2(id,'input',syncOqcPreview)); clickSafe2('printShipmentReport',()=>printEl($('shipmentReportPreview'))); // NC clickSafe2('ncSave',withSaving('nc',$('ncSave'),saveNc));clickSafe2('ncReset',clearNc);clickSafe2('printNcReport',()=>printEl($('ncFormPrintTarget'))); // Training bindTrainingEvents(); // 기타 clickSafe2('supplierSave',withSaving('sup',$('supplierSave'),saveSupplier));clickSafe2('supplierReset',clearSupplier); clickSafe2('worklogSave',withSaving('wlog',$('worklogSave'),saveWorklog));clickSafe2('worklogReset',clearWorklog); clickSafe2('addWorklogMaterial',addWorklogMat); if($('instrumentSave'))$('instrumentSave').onclick=withSaving('instrument',$('instrumentSave'),saveInstrument); if($('instrumentReset'))$('instrumentReset').onclick=clearInstrument; ['instrumentLastCal','instrumentCycle'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).addEventListener('input',calcInstrumentNext);}); if($('instrumentNextCal'))$('instrumentNextCal').addEventListener('input',updateInstrumentStatusByDate); if($('instrumentPhoto'))$('instrumentPhoto').addEventListener('input',renderInstrumentPhotoPreview); if($('instrumentPhotoFile'))$('instrumentPhotoFile').addEventListener('change',handleInstrumentPhotoFile); if($('closeInstrumentPhotoModal'))$('closeInstrumentPhotoModal').onclick=closeInstrumentPhotoModal; if($('cancelInstrumentPhotoModal'))$('cancelInstrumentPhotoModal').onclick=closeInstrumentPhotoModal; if($('instrumentPhotoModal'))$('instrumentPhotoModal').addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target.id==='instrumentPhotoModal')closeInstrumentPhotoModal();}); if($('spcItem'))$('spcItem').addEventListener('change',applySpcSpec); if($('spcAnalyze'))$('spcAnalyze').onclick=()=>getSpcInputResult(true); if($('spcSave'))$('spcSave').onclick=saveSpc; if($('spcReset'))$('spcReset').onclick=clearSpc; bindSpcUpload();bindSpcViews();bindSpcRawEvents(); if($('spcAddRow'))$('spcAddRow').onclick=addSpcRow; if($('spcDeleteSelected'))$('spcDeleteSelected').onclick=deleteSelectedSpcRows; if($('spcDownloadJson'))$('spcDownloadJson').onclick=downloadSpcJson; if($('spcPrintReport'))$('spcPrintReport').onclick=printSpcReport; ['spcLsl','spcUsl','spcTarget','spcSubgroup','spcA2','spcD3','spcD4','spcD2','spcCpkStd'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).addEventListener('input',()=>spcRecalc(false));}); if($('userSave'))$('userSave').onclick=withSaving('user',$('userSave'),saveUser);if($('userReset'))$('userReset').onclick=clearUser; let __reportTypeChanging=false; const reportTypeEl=$('reportType'); if(reportTypeEl) reportTypeEl.onchange=()=>{ if(__reportTypeChanging)return; __reportTypeChanging=true; populateReportSelect(); requestAnimationFrame(()=>{ loadStandaloneReport(); __reportTypeChanging=false; }); }; const reportSelectEl=$('reportSelect'); if(reportSelectEl) reportSelectEl.onchange=()=>loadStandaloneReport(); clickSafe2('reportReload',()=>loadStandaloneReport()); clickSafe2('printReportPage',()=>{ loadStandaloneReport(); setTimeout(()=>{ printEl($('reportPrintTarget')); },300); }); if($('traceSearch'))$('traceSearch').onclick=searchTrace;if($('traceKeyword'))$('traceKeyword').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')searchTrace();}); if($('dashRefresh'))$('dashRefresh').onclick=()=>{renderSummary();setTimeout(()=>{try{state.charts.trend&&state.charts.trend.resize();}catch(e){}},80);}; if($('globalSearch')) $('globalSearch').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')gotoTrace($('globalSearch').value.trim());}); document.addEventListener('click', e=>{ const lotLink=e.target.closest && e.target.closest('.trace-link[data-report-type][data-report-lot]'); if(!lotLink) return; e.preventDefault(); const type=lotLink.dataset.reportType; const lot=lotLink.dataset.reportLot; if(type==='oqc') openShipmentReportByLot(lot); else if(type==='iqc') openIncomingReportByLot(lot); else goReportPageByLot(type, lot); }); // 테이블 위임 const tA={ editIncoming,editProcess,editShipment,editSupplier,editWorklog,editUser,editNc,editInstrument,deleteInstrument,viewInstrumentPhoto,editSpc,deleteSpc,editTraining,printTraining,deleteTraining, labelIncoming:id=>{const r=state.incoming.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(r)openLabelModal('iqc',[r]);}, labelProcess:id=>{const r=state.process.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(r)openLabelModal('pqc',[r]);}, labelShipment:id=>{const r=state.shipment.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(r)openLabelModal('oqc',[r]);}, deleteIncoming:id=>delApi(`/api/iqc/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadIncoming();renderSummary();}), deleteProcess:id=>delApi(`/api/pqc/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadProcess();renderSummary();}), deleteShipment:id=>delApi(`/api/oqc/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadShipment();renderSummary();}), deleteNc:id=>delApi(`/api/nonconform/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadNonconform();renderSummary();}), deleteSupplier:id=>delApi(`/api/suppliers/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',loadSuppliers), deleteWorklog:id=>delApi(`/api/worklog/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadWorklog();renderSummary();}), deleteUser:id=>delApi(`/api/admin/users/${id}`,'삭제하시겠습니까?',async()=>{await loadAdminUsers();await loadSignableUsers();}) }; ['incomingTable','processTable','shipmentTable','supplierTable','worklogTable','instrumentTable','spcTable','userTable','nonconformTable','trainingTable'].forEach(tbId=>{ const tb=$(tbId); if(!tb)return; tb.addEventListener('click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('[data-action]');if(!btn)return;const{action,id}=btn.dataset;if(tA[action])tA[action](id);}); }); ['incomingItemsTable','processItemsTable','shipmentItemsTable'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))bindItemDelegate(id);}); if($('worklogMaterialsTable')){ onSafe2('worklogMaterialsTable','input',e=>{const el=e.target,i=el.dataset.widx,k=el.dataset.wkey;if(i===undefined||!k)return;state.worklogMaterialDrafts[Number(i)][k]=el.value;}); onSafe2('worklogMaterialsTable','click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('[data-waction="remove"]');if(!btn)return;state.worklogMaterialDrafts.splice(Number(btn.dataset.widx),1);renderWorklogMats();}); } } /* ═══ ENTRY ═══ */ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',async()=>{ initYears();setDefaultDates();bindNav();bindEvents();startClock(); state.incomingItemDrafts=defIqc();state.processItemDrafts=defPqc();state.shipmentItemDrafts=defOqc(); renderIqcItems();renderPqcItems();renderOqcItems();renderWorklogMats();applySpcSpec();renderSpcResult(null); const ok=await checkLogin();if(ok)await loadAll데이터(); }); /* 서명 이미지 첨부 / 결재 권한 통합 v23 - 관리자 전체 수정 잠김 해제, 일반 사용자는 본인 역할만 수정 */ (function(){ const ROLES = ['writer','reviewer','approver']; const TYPES = ['iqc','pqc','oqc','nc','training']; const ROLE_LABEL = {writer:'작성자', reviewer:'검토자', approver:'승인자'}; const qs = id => document.getElementById(id); const users = () => (window.state && Array.isArray(state.signableUsers)) ? state.signableUsers : []; const current = () => (window.state && state.currentUser) ? state.currentUser : null; window.__qmsSignBooting = true; setTimeout(() => { window.__qmsSignBooting = false; }, 1800); function nowText(){ const d = new Date(); const p = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0'); return `${d.getFullYear()}-${p(d.getMonth()+1)}-${p(d.getDate())} ${p(d.getHours())}:${p(d.getMinutes())}`; } function editIdFor(type){ return ({iqc:'incomingEditId', pqc:'processEditId', oqc:'shipmentEditId', nc:'ncEditId', training:'trainingEditId'})[type] || ''; } function isNewRecord(type){ const id = editIdFor(type); const el = id ? qs(id) : null; return !(el && String(el.value || '').trim()); } function storeKey(type, role){ return `${type}:${role}`; } function getStore(type, role){ window.__signImageStore = window.__signImageStore || {}; const k = storeKey(type, role); window.__signImageStore[k] = window.__signImageStore[k] || {}; return window.__signImageStore[k]; } function clean(v){ return String(v || '').trim(); } function samePerson(a,b){ if(!a || !b) return false; const aid = clean(a.id || a.email || a.name); const bid = clean(b.id || b.email || b.name); if(aid && bid && aid === bid) return true; const ae = clean(a.email), be = clean(b.email); if(ae && be && ae === be) return true; const an = clean(a.name), bn = clean(b.name); return !!(an && bn && an === bn); } function userObj(u){ if(!u) return null; return {id:u.id || u.email || u.name || '', name:u.name || '', title:u.title || '', department:u.department || '', email:u.email || '', role:u.role || ''}; } function meObj(){ return userObj(current()); } function currentIsAdmin(){ const me = current(); if(!me) return false; if(me.isAdmin === true || me.admin === true || me.is_admin === true) return true; const vals = [ me.role, me.permission, me.auth, me.authority, me.grade, me.level, me.type, me.userType, me.user_type, me.accountType, me.name, me.email, me.id ].map(v => clean(v).toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean); return vals.some(v => v === 'admin' || v === 'administrator' || v === 'superadmin' || v === 'super_admin' || v === '관리자' || v.includes('admin') || v.includes('관리자') ); } function currentIsSenior(){ const me = current(); if(!me) return false; if(currentIsAdmin()) return true; if(typeof window.isSenior === 'function') return !!window.isSenior(me); if(typeof isSenior === 'function') return !!isSenior(me); const title = clean(me.title); return /대표|이사|상무|전무|부장|팀장|관리자|본부장|실장|센터장|CEO|CTO|COO|CFO/i.test(title); } function findUserByIdOrName(data){ if(!data) return null; return users().find(u => (data.id && clean(u.id) === clean(data.id)) || (data.email && clean(u.email) === clean(data.email)) || (data.name && clean(u.name) === clean(data.name)) ) || null; } function savedData(type, role){ const s = getStore(type, role); return s.saved || null; } function optionText(data, label){ return `${data.name || ''} (${data.title || data.department || label || '사용자'})`; } function ensureOption(sel, data, label){ if(!sel || !data) return; const id = data.id || data.email || data.name; if(!id || !data.name) return; let opt = Array.from(sel.options || []).find(o => String(o.value) === String(id)); if(!opt){ opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = id; sel.appendChild(opt); } opt.textContent = optionText(data, label); opt.dataset.name = data.name || ''; opt.dataset.title = data.title || ''; opt.dataset.department = data.department || ''; opt.dataset.email = data.email || ''; opt.dataset.role = data.role || ''; } function populateUserOptions(sel, placeholder, filterFn){ if(!sel) return; const prev = sel.value; sel.innerHTML = ``; users().filter(u => !filterFn || filterFn(u)).forEach(u => ensureOption(sel, userObj(u), '사용자')); if(prev && Array.from(sel.options).some(o => String(o.value) === String(prev))) sel.value = prev; } function keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, data, placeholder){ if(!sel) return; const value = data && (data.id || data.email || data.name); const text = data && data.name ? optionText(data, '본인') : ''; sel.innerHTML = ``; if(value && text){ const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = value; opt.textContent = text; opt.dataset.name = data.name || ''; opt.dataset.title = data.title || ''; opt.dataset.department = data.department || ''; opt.dataset.email = data.email || ''; opt.dataset.role = data.role || ''; sel.appendChild(opt); } } function selectedUserFromSelect(type, role){ const sel = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`); if(!sel || !sel.value) return null; const opt = sel.options[sel.selectedIndex]; return userObj(users().find(u => clean(u.id || u.email || u.name) === clean(sel.value))) || { id: sel.value, name: opt?.dataset?.name || (opt?.textContent || '').replace(/\s*\(.*\)\s*$/,''), title: opt?.dataset?.title || '', department: opt?.dataset?.department || '', email: opt?.dataset?.email || '', role: opt?.dataset?.role || '' }; } function setPreview(type, role, img){ const box = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_preview`); if(!box) return; box.innerHTML = img ? `` : `서명 이미지 없음`; } function setDateText(type, role, text){ const d = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_date`); if(d) d.textContent = text || ''; } function setSub(type, role, text, color){ const sub = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_sub`); if(sub){ sub.textContent = text || ''; sub.style.color = color || ''; } } function setRoleControls(type, role, canEdit){ const file = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_file`); const wrap = document.querySelector(`[data-sign-file-wrap="${type}:${role}"]`); if(file) file.disabled = !canEdit; if(wrap){ wrap.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => { btn.disabled = !canEdit; btn.style.opacity = canEdit ? '' : '.45'; btn.style.cursor = canEdit ? '' : 'not-allowed'; }); } } function canEditRole(type, role){ if(window.__qmsSignBooting) return true; const me = meObj(); if(!me || !me.id) return false; if(currentIsAdmin()) return true; const saved = savedData(type, role); const isNew = isNewRecord(type); if(role === 'writer'){ if(isNew) return true; return !!saved && samePerson(saved, me); } if(!currentIsSenior()) return false; if(isNew) return true; if(!saved || !saved.name) return true; return samePerson(saved, me); } function selectedPayload(type, role){ const me = meObj(); const saved = savedData(type, role); const sig = window.signature데이터(type, role); const isNew = isNewRecord(type); const picked = selectedUserFromSelect(type, role); if(currentIsAdmin()){ const base = picked || saved || (role === 'writer' ? me : null); return base ? {...base, signImage:sig.signImage || base.signImage || '', signDate:sig.signDate || base.signDate || ''} : {id:'', name:'', title:'', department:'', signImage:'', signDate:''}; } if(role === 'writer'){ if(isNew) return me ? {...me, ...sig} : {id:'', name:'', title:'', department:'', ...sig}; if(saved && saved.name) return {...saved, signImage:sig.signImage || saved.signImage || '', signDate:sig.signDate || saved.signDate || ''}; return me ? {...me, ...sig} : {id:'', name:'', title:'', department:'', ...sig}; } if(isNew){ if(currentIsSenior() && me && picked && samePerson(picked, me)) return {...me, ...sig}; return {id:'', name:'', title:'', department:'', signImage:'', signDate:''}; } if(saved && saved.name) return {...saved, signImage:sig.signImage || saved.signImage || '', signDate:sig.signDate || saved.signDate || ''}; if(currentIsSenior() && me && picked && samePerson(picked, me)) return {...me, ...sig}; return {id:'', name:'', title:'', department:'', signImage:'', signDate:''}; } function applyAdminRole(type, role){ const sel = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`); if(!sel) return; const saved = savedData(type, role); const isNew = isNewRecord(type); const me = meObj(); const currentValue = sel.value; populateUserOptions(sel, `-- ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 선택 --`); if(saved && saved.name){ ensureOption(sel, saved, `저장된 ${ROLE_LABEL[role]}`); sel.value = saved.id || saved.email || saved.name || ''; }else if(isNew && role === 'writer' && me){ ensureOption(sel, me, '관리자'); sel.value = me.id || me.email || me.name || ''; }else if(currentValue && Array.from(sel.options).some(o => String(o.value) === String(currentValue))){ sel.value = currentValue; } sel.disabled = false; setSub(type, role, '관리자: 모든 사용자 선택/수정 가능', 'var(--pri)'); setRoleControls(type, role, true); } function applyRolePermission(type, role){ const sel = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`); if(!sel) return; if(currentIsAdmin()){ applyAdminRole(type, role); return; } const me = meObj(); const saved = savedData(type, role); const isNew = isNewRecord(type); const canEdit = canEditRole(type, role); if(role === 'writer'){ if(isNew){ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, me, '-- 작성자 본인 --'); if(me && me.id) sel.value = me.id; sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, me ? `${me.department || ''} ${me.title || ''}`.trim() || '로그인 본인만 작성 가능' : '로그인 정보 없음', 'var(--t3)'); }else if(saved && saved.name){ ensureOption(sel, saved, '저장된 작성자'); sel.value = saved.id || saved.email || saved.name; sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, samePerson(saved, me) ? '본인 작성자: 서명 첨부/수정 가능' : '저장된 작성자 보존', samePerson(saved, me) ? 'var(--pri)' : 'var(--t3)'); }else{ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, me, '-- 작성자 본인 --'); if(me && me.id) sel.value = me.id; sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, '작성자는 로그인 본인만 가능', 'var(--t3)'); } }else{ if(isNew){ if(currentIsSenior() && me){ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, me, `-- ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 선택 안 함 --`); if(sel.dataset.userPicked !== '1') sel.value = ''; sel.disabled = false; setSub(type, role, `${ROLE_LABEL[role]}는 본인만 선택 가능`, 'var(--pri)'); }else{ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, null, `-- ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 권한 없음 --`); sel.value = ''; sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, '부장급 이상만 검토/승인 가능', 'var(--wa)'); } }else if(saved && saved.name){ ensureOption(sel, saved, `저장된 ${ROLE_LABEL[role]}`); sel.value = saved.id || saved.email || saved.name; sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, samePerson(saved, me) ? `본인 ${ROLE_LABEL[role]}: 서명 첨부/수정 가능` : `저장된 ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 보존`, samePerson(saved, me) ? 'var(--pri)' : 'var(--t3)'); }else{ if(currentIsSenior() && me){ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, me, `-- ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 선택 안 함 --`); sel.disabled = false; setSub(type, role, `${ROLE_LABEL[role]}는 본인만 선택 가능`, 'var(--pri)'); }else{ keepOnlyBlankAnd(sel, null, `-- ${ROLE_LABEL[role]} 권한 없음 --`); sel.disabled = true; setSub(type, role, '부장급 이상만 검토/승인 가능', 'var(--wa)'); } } } setRoleControls(type, role, canEdit); } function applySignPermissions(type){ ROLES.forEach(role => applyRolePermission(type, role)); ROLES.forEach(role => notify(type, role)); } function notify(type, role){ if(typeof window.onSignChange === 'function') window.onSignChange(type, role); else if(typeof onSignChange === 'function') onSignChange(type, role); } window.signature데이터 = function(type, role){ const s = getStore(type, role); const dateEl = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_date`); return {signImage: s.signImage || '', signDate: s.signDate || (dateEl ? dateEl.textContent : '') || ''}; }; window.updateSignaturePreview = function(type, role){ const s = getStore(type, role); setPreview(type, role, s.signImage || ''); setDateText(type, role, s.signDate || ''); }; window.clearSignaturePad = function(type, role){ if(!canEditRole(type, role)) return false; const s = getStore(type, role); s.signImage = ''; s.signDate = ''; setPreview(type, role, ''); setDateText(type, role, ''); const f = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_file`); if(f) f.value = ''; notify(type, role); return true; }; window.restoreSignaturePad = function(type, role, data){ const s = getStore(type, role); s.signImage = (data && data.signImage) || ''; s.signDate = (data && data.signDate) || ''; if(data && (data.name || data.id)) s.saved = {...data}; setPreview(type, role, s.signImage); setDateText(type, role, s.signDate); }; window.getSignPayload = function(type){ applySignPermissions(type); return {writer: selectedPayload(type, 'writer'), reviewer: selectedPayload(type, 'reviewer'), approver: selectedPayload(type, 'approver')}; }; window.restoreSign = function(type, record){ if(!record) return; const map = {writer: record.signWriter, reviewer: record.signReviewer, approver: record.signApprover}; ROLES.forEach(role => { const data = map[role]; const s = getStore(type, role); s.saved = data && (data.name || data.id) ? {...data} : null; if(data){ const found = findUserByIdOrName(data); const use = found ? {...data, id: found.id || data.id, name: found.name || data.name, title: data.title || found.title || '', department: data.department || found.department || '', email: data.email || found.email || '', role: data.role || found.role || ''} : data; ensureOption(qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`), use, `저장된 ${ROLE_LABEL[role]}`); const sel = qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`); if(sel) sel.value = use.id || use.email || use.name || ''; window.restoreSignaturePad(type, role, use); }else{ s.saved = null; } }); applySignPermissions(type); }; window.applySignPermissions = applySignPermissions; window.applyAllSignPermissions = function(){ const active=document.activeElement; TYPES.forEach(type=>{ const before={}; ROLES.forEach(role=>{const sel=qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`);before[role]=sel?{value:sel.value,userPicked:sel.dataset.userPicked}:null;}); applySignPermissions(type); ROLES.forEach(role=>{ const sel=qs(`sg_${type}_${role}`), b=before[role]; if(!sel||!b||!b.value)return; const exists=Array.from(sel.options).some(o=>String(o.value)===String(b.value)); if(exists && (b.userPicked==='1'||active===sel)){ sel.value=b.value; sel.dataset.userPicked='1'; } }); ROLES.forEach(role=>notify(type,role)); }); }; /* v23: 로그인 직후 currentUser 세팅 타이밍 보정. 관리자 판별 후 잠김 해제 재적용 */ [100,300,700,1200,2000,3500].forEach(ms => setTimeout(() => { if(typeof window.applyAllSignPermissions === 'function') window.applyAllSignPermissions(); }, ms)); document.addEventListener('click', function(e){ const attach = e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[data-sign-file-btn]'); if(attach){ const [type, role] = attach.getAttribute('data-sign-file-btn').split(':'); if(!canEditRole(type, role)) return false; qs(`sg_${type}_${role}_file`)?.click(); return; } const clear = e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[data-sign-clear]'); if(clear){ const [type, role] = clear.getAttribute('data-sign-clear').split(':'); window.clearSignaturePad(type, role); } }); document.addEventListener('change', function(e){ const fileInput = e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[data-sign-file]'); if(fileInput && fileInput.files && fileInput.files[0]){ const [type, role] = fileInput.getAttribute('data-sign-file').split(':'); if(!canEditRole(type, role)){ fileInput.value = ''; return false; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(){ const s = getStore(type, role); s.signImage = String(reader.result || ''); s.signDate = nowText(); window.updateSignaturePreview(type, role); applySignPermissions(type); }; reader.readAsDataURL(fileInput.files[0]); return; } const sel = e.target.closest && e.target.closest('.sign-sel'); if(sel){ sel.dataset.userPicked = '1'; const m = /^sg_([^_]+)_(writer|reviewer|approver)$/.exec(sel.id || ''); if(m){ applySignPermissions(m[1]); } } }); window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(window.applyAllSignPermissions, 500); setTimeout(window.applyAllSignPermissions, 1500); setTimeout(() => { window.__qmsSignBooting = false; window.applyAllSignPermissions(); }, 2200); }); })();
